items.abstract_zh: 量子电路布局（QCP）是将合成的逻辑量子程序映射到物理量子机上的过程，它引入了额外的交换门并影响了量子电路的性能。然而，确定交换门的最小数量已被证明是一个 NP 完全问题。人们提出了各种启发式方法来解决 QCP，但由于缺乏探索，它们的效果并不理想。尽管精确方法可以实现更高的最优性，但由于巨大的设计空间和昂贵的运行时间，它们无法扩展用于大型量子电路。通过将 QCP 表述为双层优化问题，本文提出了一种基于机器学习 (ML) 的新颖框架来应对这一挑战。为了解决较低级别的组合优化问题，我们采用基于策略的深度强化学习（DRL）算法和知识迁移，以实现我们框架的泛化能力。然后部署进化算法来解决上层离散搜索问题，以较低的 SWAP 成本优化初始映射。所提出的基于机器学习的方法提供了一种新的范例来克服传统启发式方法和精确方法的缺点，同时能够探索最优性与运行时的权衡。与领先的启发式方法相比，我们基于机器学习的方法可显着降低交换成本高达 100%。与领先的精确搜索相比，我们提出的算法实现了相同水平的最优性，同时将运行时间成本降低了多达 40 倍。

items.title: Chiplet actuary: a quantitative cost model and multi-chiplet architecture exploration.
items.abstract: Multi-chip integration is widely recognized as the extension of Moore's Law. Cost-saving is a frequently mentioned advantage, but previous works rarely present quantitative demonstrations on the cost superiority of multi-chip integration over monolithic SoC. In this paper, we build a quantitative cost model and put forward an analytical method for multi-chip systems based on three typical multi-chip integration technologies to analyze the cost benefits from yield improvement, chiplet and package reuse, and heterogeneity. We re-examine the actual cost of multi-chip systems from various perspectives and show how to reduce the total cost of the VLSI system through appropriate multi-chiplet architecture.
items.abstract_zh: 多芯片集成被广泛认为是摩尔定律的延伸。节省成本是一个经常被提及的优势，但之前的工作很少对多芯片集成相对于单片 SoC 的成本优势进行定量论证。在本文中，我们建立了一个定量成本模型，并提出了一种基于三种典型多芯片集成技术的多芯片系统分析方法，以分析良率提高、小芯片和封装复用以及异构性带来的成本效益。我们从各个角度重新审视多芯片系统的实际成本，并展示如何通过适当的多chiplet架构来降低VLSI系统的总成本。

items.title: Contrastive quant: quantization makes stronger contrastive learning.
items.abstract: Contrastive learning learns visual representations by enforcing feature consistency under different augmented views. In this work, we explore contrastive learning from a new perspective. Interestingly, we find that quantization, when properly engineered, can enhance the effectiveness of contrastive learning. To this end, we propose a novel contrastive learning framework, dubbed Contrastive Quant, to encourage feature consistency under both differently augmented inputs via various data transformations and differently augmented weights/activations via various quantization levels. Extensive experiments, built on top of two state-of-the-art contrastive learning methods SimCLR and BYOL, show that Contrastive Quant consistently improves the learned visual representation.
items.abstract_zh: 对比学习通过在不同增强视图下强制特征一致性来学习视觉表示。在这项工作中，我们从新的角度探索对比学习。有趣的是，我们发现，如果设计得当，量化可以提高对比学习的有效性。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的对比学习框架，称为“Contrastive Quant”，以通过各种数据转换来鼓励不同增强输入下的特征一致性，并通过各种量化级别来鼓励不同增强权重/激活下的特征一致性。基于两种最先进的对比学习方法 SimCLR 和 BYOL 构建的大量实验表明，Contrastive Quant 持续改进了学习到的视觉表示。

items.title: MetaZip: a high-throughput and efficient accelerator for DEFLATE.
items.abstract:
Booming data volume has become an important challenge for data center storage and bandwidth resources. Consequently, fast and efficient compression architecture is becoming the most fundamental design in data centers. However, the compression ratio (CR) and compression throughput are often difficult to achieve at the same time on existing computing platforms. DEFLATE is a widely used compression format in data centers, which is an ideal case for hardware acceleration. Unfortunately, Deflate has an inherent connection among its special memory access pattern, which limits a higher throughput.

In this paper, we propose MetaZip, a high-throughput and scalable data-compression architecture, which is targeted for FPGA-enabled data centers. To improve the compression throughput within the constraints of FPGA resources, we propose an adaptive parallel-width pipeline, which can be fed 64bytes per cycle. To balance the compression quality, we propose a series of sub-modules (e.g. 8-bytes MetaHistory, Seed Bypass, Serialization Predictor). Experimental results show that MetaZip achieves the throughput of 15.6GB/s with a single engine, which is 234X/2.78X than a CPU gzip baseline and FPGA based architecture, respectively.
items.abstract_zh:
激增的数据量已成为数据中心存储和带宽资源的重要挑战。因此，快速高效的压缩架构正在成为数据中心最基本的设计。然而，在现有的计算平台上，压缩比（CR）和压缩吞吐量往往难以同时实现。 DEFLATE 是数据中心广泛使用的压缩格式，是硬件加速的理想案例。不幸的是，Deflate 其特殊的内存访问模式之间存在固有的联系，这限制了更高的吞吐量。

在本文中，我们提出了 MetaZip，一种高吞吐量且可扩展的数据压缩架构，面向支持 FPGA 的数据中心。为了在 FPGA 资源的限制下提高压缩吞吐量，我们提出了一种自适应并行宽度流水线，每个周期可以馈送 64 字节。为了平衡压缩质量，我们提出了一系列子模块（例如8字节MetaHistory、Seed Bypass、Serialization Predictor）。实验结果表明，MetaZip 通过单个引擎实现了 15.6GB/s 的吞吐量，分别是 CPU gzip 基线和基于 FPGA 架构的 234 倍/2.78 倍。

items.title: PPATuner: pareto-driven tool parameter auto-tuning in physical design via gaussian process transfer learning.
items.abstract: Thanks to the amazing semiconductor scaling, incredible design complexity makes the synthesis-centric very large-scale integration (VLSI) design flow increasingly rely on electronic design automation (EDA) tools. However, invoking EDA tools especially the physical synthesis tool may require several hours or even days for only one possible parameters combination. Even worse, for a new design, oceans of attempts to navigate high quality-of-results (QoR) after physical synthesis have to be made via multiple tool runs with numerous combinations of tunable tool parameters. Additionally, designers often puzzle over simultaneously considering multiple QoR metrics of interest (e.g., delay, power, and area). To tackle the dilemma within finite resource budget, designing a multi-objective parameter auto-tuning framework of the physical design tool which can learn from historical tool configurations and transfer the associated knowledge to new tasks is in demand. In this paper, we propose PPATuner, a Pareto-driven physical design tool parameter tuning methodology, to achieve a good trade-off among multiple QoR metrics of interest (e.g., power, area, delay) at the physical design stage. By incorporating the transfer Gaussian process (GP) model, it can autonomously learn the transfer knowledge from the existing tool parameter combinations. The experimental results on industrial benchmarks under the 7nm technology node demonstrate the merits of our framework.
items.abstract_zh: 由于令人惊叹的半导体缩放比例，令人难以置信的设计复杂性使得以综合为中心的超大规模集成（VLSI）设计流程越来越依赖电子设计自动化（EDA）工具。然而，对于一种可能的参数组合，调用EDA工具尤其是物理综合工具可能需要几个小时甚至几天的时间。更糟糕的是，对于新设计来说，必须通过使用多种可调工具参数组合的多个工具运行来进行大量尝试，以在物理综合后获得高质量的结果 (QoR)。此外，设计人员常常对同时考虑多个感兴趣的 QoR 指标（例如延迟、功耗和面积）感到困惑。为了解决有限资源预算内的困境，需要设计一个物理设计工具的多目标参数自动调整框架，该框架可以从历史工具配置中学习并将相关知识转移到新任务中。在本文中，我们提出了 PPATuner，一种 Pareto 驱动的物理设计工具参数调整方法，以在物理设计阶段实现多个感兴趣的 QoR 指标（例如功率、面积、延迟）之间的良好权衡。通过结合传递高斯过程（GP）模型，它可以从现有的工具参数组合中自主学习传递知识。 7nm技术节点下工业基准的实验结果证明了我们框架的优点。

items.title: DETERRENT: detecting trojans using reinforcement learning.
items.abstract: Insertion of hardware Trojans (HTs) in integrated circuits is a pernicious threat. Since HTs are activated under rare trigger conditions, detecting them using random logic simulations is infeasible. In this work, we design a reinforcement learning (RL) agent that circumvents the exponential search space and returns a minimal set of patterns that is most likely to detect HTs. Experimental results on a variety of benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy and scalability of our RL agent, which obtains a significant reduction (169×) in the number of test patterns required while maintaining or improving coverage (95.75%) compared to the state-of-the-art techniques.
items.abstract_zh: 在集成电路中插入硬件木马 (HT) 是一种有害的威胁。由于 HT 在罕见的触发条件下被激活，因此使用随机逻辑模拟来检测它们是不可行的。在这项工作中，我们设计了一个强化学习 (RL) 代理，它绕过指数搜索空间并返回最有可能检测到 HT 的最小模式集。各种基准的实验结果证明了我们的 RL 代理的有效性和可扩展性，与最先进的技术相比，它在保持或提高覆盖率 (95.75%) 的同时，显着减少 (169 倍) 所需的测试模式数量。

items.title: LPCA: learned MRC profiling based cache allocation for file storage systems.
items.abstract:
File storage system (FSS) uses multi-caches to accelerate data accesses. Unfortunately, efficient FSS cache allocation remains extremely difficult. First, as the key of cache allocation, existing miss ratio curve (MRC) constructions are limited to LRU. Second, existing techniques are suitable for same-layer caches but not for hierarchical ones.

We present a Learned MRC Profiling based Cache Allocation (LPCA) scheme for FSS. To the best of our knowledge, LPCA is the first to apply machine learning to model MRC under non-LRU, LPCA also explores optimization target for hierarchical caches, in that LPCA can provide universal and efficient cache allocation for FSSs.
items.abstract_zh:
文件存储系统（FSS）使用多缓存来加速数据访问。不幸的是，高效的 FSS 缓存分配仍然极其困难。首先，作为缓存分配的关键，现有的未命中率曲线（MRC）构造仅限于LRU。其次，现有技术适用于同层缓存，但不适用于分层缓存。

我们提出了一种基于学习 MRC 分析的 FSS 缓存分配 (LPCA) 方案。据我们所知，LPCA是第一个将机器学习应用于非LRU下的MRC模型，LPCA还探索了分层缓存的优化目标，LPCA可以为FSS提供通用且高效的缓存分配。

items.title: Optimizing parallel PREM compilation over nested loop structures.
items.abstract: We consider automatic parallelization of a computational kernel executed according to the PRedictable Execution Model (PREM), where each thread is divided into execution and memory phases. We target a scratchpad-based architecture, where memory phases are executed by a dedicated DMA component. We employ data analysis and loop tiling to split the kernel execution into segments, and schedule them based on a DAG representation of data and execution dependencies. Our main observation is that properly selecting tile sizes is key to optimize the makespan of the kernel. We thus propose a heuristic that efficiently searches for optimized tile size and core assignments over deeply nested loops, and demonstrate its applicability and performance compared to the state-of-the-art in PREM compilation using the PolyBench-NN benchmark suite.
items.abstract_zh: 我们考虑根据 PRedictable 执行模型 (PREM) 执行的计算内核的自动并行化，其中每个线程分为执行和内存阶段。我们的目标是基于暂存器的架构，其中内存阶段由专用 DMA 组件执行。我们采用数据分析和循环平铺将内核执行分成多个段，并根据数据和执行依赖性的 DAG 表示来调度它们。我们的主要观察是，正确选择切片大小是优化内核完工时间的关键。因此，我们提出了一种启发式方法，可以在深度嵌套循环上有效搜索优化的切片大小和核心分配，并与使用 PolyBench-NN 基准套件的 PREM 编译中最先进的技术相比，展示其适用性和性能。

items.title: ADEPT: automatic differentiable DEsign of photonic tensor cores.
items.abstract: Photonic tensor cores (PTCs) are essential building blocks for optical artificial intelligence (AI) accelerators based on programmable photonic integrated circuits. PTCs can achieve ultra-fast and efficient tensor operations for neural network (NN) acceleration. Current PTC designs are either manually constructed or based on matrix decomposition theory, which lacks the adaptability to meet various hardware constraints and device specifications. To our best knowledge, automatic PTC design methodology is still unexplored. It will be promising to move beyond the manual design paradigm and "nurture" photonic neurocomputing with AI and design automation. Therefore, in this work, for the first time, we propose a fully differentiable framework, dubbed ADEPT, that can efficiently search PTC designs adaptive to various circuit footprint constraints and foundry PDKs. Extensive experiments show superior flexibility and effectiveness of the proposed ADEPT framework to explore a large PTC design space. On various NN models and benchmarks, our searched PTC topology outperforms prior manually-designed structures with competitive matrix representability, 2 ×- 30 × higher footprint compactness, and better noise robustness, demonstrating a new paradigm in photonic neural chip design. The code of ADEPT is available at link using the TorchONN library.
items.abstract_zh: 光子张量核心 (PTC) 是基于可编程光子集成电路的光学人工智能 (AI) 加速器的重要构建模块。 PTC 可以实现超快速、高效的张量运算，以实现神经网络 (NN) 加速。目前的PTC设计要么是手工构造的，要么是基于矩阵分解理论的，缺乏满足各种硬件约束和设备规格的适应性。据我们所知，自动 PTC 设计方法仍未得到探索。它将有望超越手动设计范式，通过人工智能和设计自动化“培育”光子神经计算。因此，在这项工作中，我们首次提出了一个完全可微分的框架，称为 ADEPT，它可以有效地搜索适应各种电路占用空间约束和代工 PDK 的 PTC 设计。大量实验表明，所提出的 ADEPT 框架在探索大型 PTC 设计空间方面具有卓越的灵活性和有效性。在各种神经网络模型和基准测试中，我们搜索的 PTC 拓扑优于之前手动设计的结构，具有竞争性的矩阵可表示性、2 × - 30 × 更高的占用空间紧凑性和更好的噪声鲁棒性，展示了光子神经芯片设计的新范例。 ADEPT 的代码可通过使用 TorchONN 库的链接获得。

items.title: Differentiable-timing-driven global placement.
items.abstract: Placement is critical to the timing closure of the very-large-scale integrated (VLSI) circuit design flow. This paper proposes a differentiable-timing-driven global placement framework inspired by deep neural networks. By establishing the analogy between static timing analysis and neural network propagation, we propose a differentiable timing objective for placement to explicitly optimize timing metrics such as total negative slack (TNS) and worst negative slack (WNS). The framework can achieve at most 32.7% and 59.1% improvements on WNS and TNS respectively compared with the state-of-the-art timing-driven placer, and achieve 1.80× speed-up when both running on GPU.
items.abstract_zh: 布局对于超大规模集成 (VLSI) 电路设计流程的时序收敛至关重要。本文提出了一种受深度神经网络启发的可微时序驱动的全局布局框架。通过建立静态时序分析和神经网络传播之间的类比，我们提出了一个可微分时序目标用于布局，以显式优化时序指标，例如总负裕度（TNS）和最差负裕度（WNS）。与最先进的时序驱动布局器相比，该框架在 WNS 和 TNS 上分别实现了最多 32.7% 和 59.1% 的改进，并且在 GPU 上运行时实现了 1.80 倍的加速。

items.title: A timing engine inspired graph neural network model for pre-routing slack prediction.
items.abstract: Fast and accurate pre-routing timing prediction is essential for timing-driven placement since repetitive routing and static timing analysis (STA) iterations are expensive and unacceptable. Prior work on timing prediction aims at estimating net delay and slew, lacking the ability to model global timing metrics. In this work, we present a timing engine inspired graph neural network (GNN) to predict arrival time and slack at timing endpoints. We further leverage edge delays as local auxiliary tasks to facilitate model training with increased model performance. Experimental results on real-world open-source designs demonstrate improved model accuracy and explainability when compared with vanilla deep GNN models.
items.abstract_zh: 快速、准确的预布线时序预测对于时序驱动布局至关重要，因为重复布线和静态时序分析 (STA) 迭代成本高昂且不可接受。先前的时序预测工作旨在估计网络延迟和转换，缺乏对全局时序指标进行建模的能力。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种受时序引擎启发的图神经网络（GNN）来预测时序端点的到达时间和松弛。我们进一步利用边缘延迟作为本地辅助任务，以促进模型训练并提高模型性能。现实世界开源设计的实验结果表明，与普通深度 GNN 模型相比，模型准确性和可解释性得到了提高。

items.title: DELTA: DEsigning a stealthy trigger mechanism for analog hardware trojans and its detection analysis.
items.abstract: This paper presents a stealthy triggering mechanism that reduces the dependencies of analog hardware Trojans on the frequent toggling of the software-controlled rare nets. The trigger to activate the Trojan is generated by using a glitch generation circuit and a clock signal, which increases the selectivity and feasibility of the trigger signal. The proposed trigger is able to evade the state-of-the-art run-time detection (R2D2) and Built-In Acceleration Structure (BIAS) schemes. Furthermore, the simulation results show that the proposed trigger circuit incurs a minimal overhead in side-channel footprints in terms of area (29 transistors), delay (less than 1 ps in the clock cycle), and power (1 μ W).
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种隐秘的触发机制，可以减少模拟硬件木马对软件控制的稀有网络频繁切换的依赖。利用毛刺产生电路和时钟信号来产生激活木马的触发信号，增加了触发信号的选择性和可行性。所提出的触发器能够逃避最先进的运行时检测（R2D2）和内置加速结构（BIAS）方案。此外，仿真结果表明，所提出的触发电路在侧通道占用面积（29 个晶体管）、延迟（时钟周期中小于 1 ps）和功率（1 μW）方面的开销最小。

items.title: Apple vs. EMA: electromagnetic side channel attacks on apple CoreCrypto.
items.abstract:
Cryptographic instruction set extensions are commonly used for ciphers which would otherwise face unacceptable side channel risks. A prominent example of such an extension is the ARMv8 Cryptographic Extension, or ARM CE for short, which defines dedicated instructions to securely accelerate AES. However, while these extensions may be resistant to traditional "digital" side channel attacks, they may still be vulnerable to physical side channel attacks.

In this work, we demonstrate the first such attack on a standard ARM CE AES implementation. We specifically focus on the implementation used by Apple's CoreCrypto library which we run on the Apple A10 Fusion SoC. To that end, we implement an optimized side channel acquisition infrastructure involving both custom iPhone software and accelerated analysis code. We find that an adversary which can observe 5--30 million known-ciphertext traces can reliably extract secret AES keys using electromagnetic (EM) radiation as a side channel. This corresponds to an encryption operation on less than half of a gigabyte of data, which could be acquired in less than 2 seconds on the iPhone 7 we examined. Our attack thus highlights the need for side channel defenses for real devices and production, industry-standard encryption software.
items.abstract_zh:
密码指令集扩展通常用于密码，否则将面临不可接受的侧信道风险。此类扩展的一个突出示例是 ARMv8 加密扩展（简称 ARM CE），它定义了用于安全加速 AES 的专用指令。然而，虽然这些扩展可以抵抗传统的“数字”侧信道攻击，但它们仍然可能容易受到物理侧信道攻击。

在这项工作中，我们演示了对标准 ARM CE AES 实现的首次此类攻击。我们特别关注在 Apple A10 Fusion SoC 上运行的 Apple CoreCrypto 库所使用的实现。为此，我们实施了优化的侧通道采集基础设施，涉及定制 iPhone 软件和加速分析代码。我们发现，可以观察 5--3000 万条已知密文痕迹的对手可以使用电磁 (EM) 辐射作为旁路可靠地提取秘密 AES 密钥。这相当于对不到 0.5 GB 数据的加密操作，在我们检查的 iPhone 7 上可以在不到 2 秒的时间内获取这些数据。因此，我们的攻击凸显了对真实设备和生产行业标准加密软件进行侧通道防御的需求。

items.title: Power-aware pruning for ultrafast, energy-efficient, and accurate optical neural network design.
items.abstract: With the rapid progress of the integrated nanophotonics technology, the optical neural network (ONN) architecture has been widely investigated. Although the ONN inference is fast, conventional densely connected network structures consume large amounts of power in laser sources. We propose a novel ONN design method that finds an ultrafast, energy-efficient, and accurate ONN structure. The key idea is power-aware edge pruning that derives the near-optimal numbers of edges in the entire network. Optoelectronic circuit simulation demonstrates the correct functional behavior of the ONN. Furthermore, experimental evaluations using tensor-flow show the proposed methods achieved 98.28% power reduction without significant loss of accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 随着集成纳米光子技术的快速进步，光学神经网络（ONN）架构得到了广泛的研究。尽管 ONN 推理速度很快，但传统的密集连接网络结构会消耗大量激光源功率。我们提出了一种新颖的 ONN 设计方法，可以找到超快、节能且准确的 ONN 结构。关键思想是功率感知的边缘修剪，它可以得出整个网络中接近最佳的边缘数量。光电电路仿真演示了 ONN 的正确功能行为。此外，使用张量流的实验评估表明，所提出的方法实现了 98.28% 的功耗降低，而精度没有显着损失。

items.title: Accurate timing prediction at placement stage with look-ahead RC network.
items.abstract: Timing closure is a critical but effort-taking task in VLSI designs. In placement stage, a fast and accurate net delay estimator is highly desirable to guide the timing optimization prior to routing, and thus reduce the timing pessimism and shorten the design turn-around time. To handle the timing uncertainty at the placement stage, we propose a fast net delay timing predictor based on machine learning, which extract the fully timing features using a look-ahead RC network. Experimental results show that the proposed timing predictor has achieved average correlation over 0.99 with the post-routing sign-off timing results obtained in Synopsys PrimeTime.
items.abstract_zh: 时序收敛是 VLSI 设计中一项关键但耗时的任务。在布局阶段，非常需要快速准确的网络延迟估计器来指导布线之前的时序优化，从而减少时序悲观并缩短设计周转时间。为了处理布局阶段的时序不确定性，我们提出了一种基于机器学习的快速网络延迟时序预测器，它使用前瞻 RC 网络提取完整的时序特征。实验结果表明，所提出的时序预测器与 Synopsys PrimeTime 中获得的路由后签核时序结果的平均相关性超过 0.99。

items.title: InfoX: an energy-efficient ReRAM accelerator design with information-lossless low-bit ADCs.
items.abstract: ReRAM-based accelerators have shown great potential in neural network acceleration via in-memory analog computing. However, high-precision analog-to-digital converters (ADCs), which are required by the ReRAM crossbars to achieve high-accuracy network model inference, play an essential role in the energy-efficiency of the accelerators. Based on the discovery that the ADC precision requirements of crossbars are different, we propose the model-aware crossbarwise ADC precision assignment and the accompanied information-lossless low-bit ADCs to reduce energy overhead without sacrificing model accuracy. In experiments, the proposed information-lossless ReRAM accelerator, InfoX, only consumes 8.97% ADC energy of the SOTA baseline with no accuracy degradation at all.
items.abstract_zh: 基于 ReRAM 的加速器在通过内存模拟计算进行神经网络加速方面展现出了巨大的潜力。然而，ReRAM 交叉开关实现高精度网络模型推理所需的高精度模数转换器 (ADC) 在加速器的能效方面发挥着至关重要的作用。基于交叉开关的 ADC 精度要求不同的发现，我们提出了模型感知的交叉开关 ADC 精度分配和随附的信息无损低位 ADC，以在不牺牲模型精度的情况下减少能量开销。在实验中，所提出的信息无损 ReRAM 加速器 InfoX 仅消耗 SOTA 基线的 8.97% ADC 能量，并且完全没有精度下降。

items.title: Processing-in-SRAM acceleration for ultra-low power visual 3D perception.
items.abstract: Real-time ego-motion tracking and 3D structural estimation are the fundamental tasks for the ubiquitous cyper-physical systems, and they can be conducted via the state-of-the-art Edge-Based Visual Odometry (EBVO) algorithm. However, the intrinsic data-intensive process of EBVO emplaces a memory-wall hurdle in practical deployment on conventional von-Neumann-style computing systems. In this work, we attempt to leverage SRAM based processing-in-memory (PIM) technique to alleviate such memory-wall bottleneck, so as to optimize the EBVO systematically from the perspectives of the algorithm layer and physical layer. In the algorithm layer, we first investigate the data reuse patterns of the essential computing kernels required for the feature detection and pose estimation steps in EBVO, and propose PIM friendly data layout and computing scheme for each kernel accordingly. We distill the basic logical and arithmetical operations required in the algorithm layer, and in the physical layer, we propose a novel bit-parallel and reconfigurable SRAM-PIM architecture to realize the operations with high computing precision and throughput. Our experimental result shows that the proposed multi-layer optimization allows for high tracking accuracy of EBVO, and it can improve 11x processing speed and reduce 20x energy consumption compared to the CPU implementation.
items.abstract_zh: 实时自我运动跟踪和 3D 结构估计是无处不在的信息物理系统的基本任务，它们可以通过最先进的基于边缘的视觉里程计 (EBVO) 算法来执行。然而，EBVO 固有的数据密集型过程在传统冯诺依曼式计算系统的实际部署中设置了内存墙障碍。在这项工作中，我们尝试利用基于SRAM的内存处理（PIM）技术来缓解这种内存墙瓶颈，从而从算法层和物理层的角度系统地优化EBVO。在算法层，我们首先研究EBVO中特征检测和姿态估计步骤所需的基本计算内核的数据重用模式，并相应地为每个内核提出PIM友好的数据布局和计算方案。我们提炼了算法层所需的基本逻辑和算术运算，在物理层，我们提出了一种新颖的位并行和可重构的SRAM-PIM架构，以实现高计算精度和吞吐量的运算。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的多层优化可以实现 EBVO 的高跟踪精度，并且与 CPU 实现相比，它可以提高 11 倍的处理速度并降低 20 倍的能耗。

items.title: Hyperdimensional hashing: a robust and efficient dynamic hash table.
items.abstract: Most cloud services and distributed applications rely on hashing algorithms that allow dynamic scaling of a robust and efficient hash table. Examples include AWS, Google Cloud and BitTorrent. Consistent and rendezvous hashing are algorithms that minimize key remapping as the hash table resizes. While memory errors in large-scale cloud deployments are common, neither algorithm offers both efficiency and robustness. Hyperdimensional Computing is an emerging computational model that has inherent efficiency, robustness and is well suited for vector or hardware acceleration. We propose Hyperdimensional (HD) hashing and show that it has the efficiency to be deployed in large systems. Moreover, a realistic level of memory errors causes more than 20% mismatches for consistent hashing while HD hashing remains unaffected.
items.abstract_zh: 大多数云服务和分布式应用程序都依赖于哈希算法，该算法允许动态扩展健壮且高效的哈希表。示例包括 AWS、Google Cloud 和 BitTorrent。一致哈希和会合哈希是在哈希表大小调整时最小化键重新映射的算法。虽然大规模云部署中的内存错误很常见，但这两种算法都无法同时提供效率和稳健性。超维计算是一种新兴的计算模型，具有固有的效率、鲁棒性，非常适合矢量或硬件加速。我们提出超维（HD）哈希，并证明它具有在大型系统中部署的效率。此外，现实水平的内存错误会导致一致性哈希超过 20% 的不匹配，而 HD 哈希不受影响。

items.title: Enabling hard constraints in differentiable neural network and accelerator co-exploration.
items.abstract: Co-exploration of an optimal neural architecture and its hardware accelerator is an approach of rising interest which addresses the computational cost problem, especially in low-profile systems. The large co-exploration space is often handled by adopting the idea of differentiable neural architecture search. However, despite the superior search efficiency of the differentiable co-exploration, it faces a critical challenge of not being able to systematically satisfy hard constraints such as frame rate. To handle the hard constraint problem of differentiable co-exploration, we propose HDX, which searches for hard-constrained solutions without compromising the global design objectives. By manipulating the gradients in the interest of the given hard constraint, high-quality solutions satisfying the constraint can be obtained.
items.abstract_zh: 共同探索最佳神经架构及其硬件加速器是一种越来越受关注的方法，它解决了计算成本问题，特别是在低调系统中。大的共同探索空间通常通过采用可微神经架构搜索的思想来处理。然而，尽管可微协同探索具有卓越的搜索效率，但它面临着无法系统地满足帧速率等硬约束的严峻挑战。为了处理可微协同探索的硬约束问题，我们提出了 HDX，它在不损害全局设计目标的情况下搜索硬约束解决方案。通过根据给定的硬约束操纵梯度，可以获得满足约束的高质量解决方案。

items.title: Zhuyi: perception processing rate estimation for safety in autonomous vehicles.
items.abstract: The processing requirement of autonomous vehicles (AVs) for high-accuracy perception in complex scenarios can exceed the resources offered by the in-vehicle computer, degrading safety and comfort. This paper proposes a sensor frame processing rate (FPR) estimation model, Zhuyi, that quantifies the minimum safe FPR continuously in a driving scenario. Zhuyi can be employed post-deployment as an online safety check and to prioritize work. Experiments conducted using a multi-camera state-of-the-art industry AV system show that Zhuyi's estimated FPRs are conservative, yet the system can maintain safety by processing only 36% or fewer frames compared to a default 30-FPR system in the tested scenarios.
items.abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 在复杂场景中对高精度感知的处理要求可能会超出车载计算机提供的资源，从而降低安全性和舒适性。本文提出了一种传感器帧处理率（FPR）估计模型Zhuyi，它可以在驾驶场景中连续量化最小安全FPR。 Zhuyi 可以在部署后用作在线安全检查并确定工作优先级。使用多摄像头最先进的行业 AV 系统进行的实验表明，Zhuyi 估计的 FPR 较为保守，但在测试场景中，与默认的 30-FPR 系统相比，该系统仅处理 36% 或更少的帧，从而保持安全性。

items.title: GuardNN: secure accelerator architecture for privacy-preserving deep learning.
items.abstract: This paper proposes GuardNN, a secure DNN accelerator that provides hardware-based protection for user data and model parameters even in an untrusted environment. GuardNN shows that the architecture and protection can be customized for a specific application to provide strong confidentiality and integrity guarantees with negligible overhead. The design of the GuardNN instruction set reduces the TCB to just the accelerator and allows confidentiality protection even when the instructions from a host cannot be trusted. GuardNN minimizes the overhead of memory encryption and integrity verification by customizing the off-chip memory protection for the known memory access patterns of a DNN accelerator. GuardNN is prototyped on an FPGA, demonstrating effective confidentiality protection with ~3% performance overhead for inference.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了 GuardNN，这是一种安全的 DNN 加速器，即使在不可信的环境中，也能为用户数据和模型参数提供基于硬件的保护。 GuardNN 表明，可以针对特定应用程序定制架构和保护，以提供强大的机密性和完整性保证，而开销可以忽略不计。 GuardNN 指令集的设计将 TCB 简化为加速器，即使来自主机的指令不可信，也可以实现机密性保护。 GuardNN 通过针对 DNN 加速器的已知内存访问模式定制片外内存保护，最大限度地减少内存加密和完整性验证的开销。 GuardNN 在 FPGA 上进行原型设计，展示了有效的机密性保护，推理性能开销约为 3%。

items.title: Compressive sensing based asymmetric semantic image compression for resource-constrained IoT system.
items.abstract: The widespread application of Internet-of-Things (IoT) and deep learning have made machine-to-machine semantic communication possible. However, it remains challenging to deploy DNN model on IoT devices, due to their limited computing and storage capacity. In this paper, we propose Compressed Sensing based Asymmetric Semantic Image Compression (CS-ASIC) for resource-constrained IoT systems, which consists of a lightweight front encoder and a deep iterative decoder offloaded at the server. We further consider a task-oriented scenario and optimize CS-ASIC for the semantic recognition tasks. The experiment results demonstrate that CS-ASIC achieves considerable data-semantic rate-distortion trade-off, and low encoding complexity over prevailing codecs.
items.abstract_zh: 物联网和深度学习的广泛应用使机器对机器的语义通信成为可能。然而，由于物联网设备的计算和存储容量有限，在物联网设备上部署 DNN 模型仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们针对资源受限的物联网系统提出了基于压缩感知的非对称语义图像压缩（CS-ASIC），它由轻量级前端编码器和在服务器上卸载的深度迭代解码器组成。我们进一步考虑面向任务的场景，并针对语义识别任务优化 CS-ASIC。实验结果表明，与主流编解码器相比，CS-ASIC 实现了相当大的数据语义率失真权衡，并且编码复杂度较低。

items.title: Shfl-BW: accelerating deep neural network inference with tensor-core aware weight pruning.
items.abstract:
Weight pruning in deep neural networks (DNNs) can reduce storage and computation cost, but struggles to bring practical speedup to the model inference time. Tensor-cores can significantly boost the throughput of GPUs on dense computation, but exploiting tensor-cores for sparse DNNs is very challenging. Compared to existing CUDA-cores, tensor-cores require higher data reuse and matrix-shaped instruction granularity, both difficult to yield from sparse DNN kernels. Existing pruning approaches fail to balance the demands of accuracy and efficiency: random sparsity preserves the model quality well but prohibits tensor-core acceleration, while highly-structured block-wise sparsity can exploit tensor-cores but suffers from severe accuracy loss.

In this work, we propose a novel sparse pattern, Shuffled Blockwise sparsity (Shfl-BW) , designed to efficiently utilize tensor-cores while minimizing the constraints on the weight structure. Our insight is that row- and column-wise permutation provides abundant flexibility for the weight structure, while introduces negligible overheads using our GPU kernel designs. We optimize the GPU kernels for Shfl-BW in linear and convolution layers. Evaluations show that our techniques can achieve the state-of-the-art speed-accuracy trade-offs on GPUs. For example, with small accuracy loss, we can accelerate the computation-intensive layers of Transformer [1] by 1.81, 4.18 and 1.90 × on NVIDIA V100, T4 and A100 GPUs respectively at 75% sparsity.
items.abstract_zh:
深度神经网络 (DNN) 中的权重剪枝可以降低存储和计算成本，但难以实际加速模型推理时间。张量核可以显着提高 GPU 在密集计算上的吞吐量，但将张量核用于稀疏 DNN 非常具有挑战性。与现有的 CUDA 核心相比，张量核心需要更高的数据重用和矩阵形状的指令粒度，而这两者都很难从稀疏 DNN 内核中获得。现有的剪枝方法无法平衡精度和效率的要求：随机稀疏性可以很好地保持模型质量，但会阻碍张量核加速，而高度结构化的分块稀疏性可以利用张量核，但会遭受严重的精度损失。

在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的稀疏模式，即随机块稀疏（Shfl-BW），旨在有效利用张量核心，同时最大限度地减少对权重结构的约束。我们的见解是，行和列的排列为权重结构提供了丰富的灵活性，同时使用我们的 GPU 内核设计引入的开销可以忽略不计。我们在线性层和卷积层中针对 Shfl-BW 优化了 GPU 内核。评估表明，我们的技术可以在 GPU 上实现最先进的速度与精度权衡。例如，在精度损失较小的情况下，我们可以在 NVIDIA V100、T4 和 A100 GPU 上以 75% 的稀疏度将 Transformer [1] 的计算密集型层分别加速 1.81、4.18 和 1.90 倍。

items.title: Pref-X: a framework to reveal data prefetching in commercial in-order cores.
items.abstract:
Computer system simulators are major tools used by architecture researchers to develop and evaluate new ideas. Clearly, such evaluations are more conclusive when compared to commercial state-of-the-art architectures. However, the behavior of key components in existing processors is often not disclosed, complicating the construction of faithful reference models. The data prefetching engine is one of such obscured components that can have a significant impact on key metrics such as performance and energy.

In this paper, we propose Pref-X, a framework to analyze functional characteristics of data prefetching in commercial in-order cores. Our framework reveals data prefetches by X-raying into the cache memory at the request granularity, which allows linking memory access patterns with changes in the cache content. To demonstrate the power and accuracy of our methodology, we use Pref-X to replicate the data prefetching mechanisms of two representative processors, namely the Arm Cortex-A7 and the Arm Cortex-A53, with a 99.8% and 96.9% average accuracy, respectively.
items.abstract_zh:
计算机系统模拟器是建筑研究人员用来开发和评估新想法的主要工具。显然，与商业最先进的架构相比，此类评估更具决定性。然而，现有处理器中关键组件的行为通常不会被公开，这使得忠实参考模型的构建变得复杂。数据预取引擎是此类模糊组件之一，它可能对性能和能源等关键指标产生重大影响。

在本文中，我们提出了 Pref-X，一个用于分析商业有序核心中数据预取功能特征的框架。我们的框架通过按请求粒度将数据预取到高速缓存中来揭示数据预取，这允许将内存访问模式与高速缓存内容的变化联系起来。为了证明我们方法的强大功能和准确性，我们使用 Pref-X 复制两个代表性处理器（即 Arm Cortex-A7 和 Arm Cortex-A53）的数据预取机制，平均准确度分别为 99.8% 和 96.9%。

items.title: Neural computation for robust and holographic face detection.
items.abstract: Face detection is an essential component of many tasks in computer vision with several applications. However, existing deep learning solutions are significantly slow and inefficient to enable face detection on embedded platforms. In this paper, we propose HDFace, a novel framework for highly efficient and robust face detection. HDFace exploits HyperDimensional Computing (HDC) as a neurally-inspired computational paradigm that mimics important brain functionalities towards high-efficiency and noise-tolerant computation. We first develop a novel technique that enables HDC to perform stochastic arithmetic computations over binary hypervectors. Next, we expand these arithmetic for efficient and robust processing of feature extraction algorithms in hyperspace. Finally, we develop an adaptive hyperdimensional classification algorithm for effective and robust face detection. We evaluate the effectiveness of HDFace on large-scale emotion detection and face detection applications. Our results indicate that HDFace provides, on average, 6.1X (4.6X) speedup and 3.0X (12.1X) energy efficiency as compared to neural networks running on CPU (FPGA), respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 人脸检测是计算机视觉中许多任务的重要组成部分，具有多种应用。然而，现有的深度学习解决方案在嵌入式平台上实现人脸检测速度明显缓慢且效率低下。在本文中，我们提出了 HDFace，一种用于高效且鲁棒的人脸检测的新颖框架。 HDFace 利用超维计算 (HDC) 作为一种受神经启发的计算范例，模仿重要的大脑功能，实现高效和耐噪声计算。我们首先开发了一种新技术，使 HDC 能够在二进制超向量上执行随机算术计算。接下来，我们扩展这些算法，以实现超空间中特征提取算法的高效和鲁棒处理。最后，我们开发了一种自适应超维分类算法，用于有效且鲁棒的人脸检测。我们评估 HDFace 在大规模情感检测和人脸检测应用中的有效性。我们的结果表明，与在 CPU (FPGA) 上运行的神经网络相比，HDFace 平均分别提供 6.1 倍 (4.6 倍) 的加速和 3.0 倍 (12.1 倍) 的能源效率。

items.title: A fast and low-cost comparison-free sorting engine with unary computing: late breaking results.
items.abstract: Hardware-efficient implementation of sorting operation is crucial for numerous applications, particularly when fast and energy-efficient sorting of data is desired. Unary computing has been used for low-cost hardware sorting. This work proposes a comparison-free unary sorting engine by iteratively finding maximum values. Synthesis results show up to 81% reduction in hardware area compared to the state-of-the-art unary sorting design. By processing right-aligned unary bit-streams, our unary sorter is able to sort many inputs in fewer clock cycles.
items.abstract_zh: 排序操作的硬件高效实现对于许多应用来说至关重要，特别是当需要快速且节能的数据排序时。一元计算已用于低成本硬件排序。这项工作提出了一种通过迭代查找最大值的无比较一元排序引擎。综合结果显示，与最先进的一元排序设计相比，硬件面积减少了 81%。通过处理右对齐的一元比特流，我们的一元排序器能够在更少的时钟周期内对许多输入进行排序。

items.title: GNN-based concentration prediction for random microfluidic mixers.
items.abstract: Recent years have witnessed significant advances brought by microfluidic biochips in automating biochemical processing. Accurate preparation of fluid samples with microfluidic mixers is a fundamental step in various biomedical applications, where concentration prediction and generation are critical. Finite element analysis (FEA) is the most commonly used simulation method for accurate concentration prediction of a given biochip design, such as COMSOL. However, the FEA simulation process is time-consuming with poor scalability for large biochip sizes. This paper proposes a new concentration prediction method based on the graph neural networks (GNN), which efficiently and accurately predicts the generated concentration by random microfluidic mixers of different sizes. Experimental results show that compared with the state-of-the-art method, the proposed GNN-based simulation method obtains a reduction of 88% in terms of errors of predicted concentration, which validates the effectiveness of the proposed GNN model.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，微流控生物芯片在自动化生化处理方面取得了重大进展。使用微流体混合器准确制备流体样品是各种生物医学应用中的基本步骤，其中浓度预测和生成至关重要。有限元分析 (FEA) 是最常用的模拟方法，用于精确预测给定生物芯片设计的浓度，例如 COMSOL。然而，FEA 仿真过程非常耗时，而且对于大尺寸生物芯片的可扩展性较差。本文提出了一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的新浓度预测方法，该方法可以高效、准确地预测不同尺寸的随机微流控混合器生成的浓度。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的基于 GNN 的模拟方法在预测浓度方面的误差降低了 88％，这验证了所提出的 GNN 模型的有效性。

items.title: EMS: efficient memory subsystem synthesis for spatial accelerators.
items.abstract:
Spatial accelerators provide massive parallelism with an array of homogeneous PEs, and enable efficient data reuse with PE array dataflow and on-chip memory. Many previous works have studied the dataflow architecture of spatial accelerators, including performance analysis and automatic generation. However, existing accelerator generators fail to exploit the entire memory-level reuse opportunities, and generate suboptimal designs with data duplication and inefficient interconnection.

In this paper, we propose EMS, an efficient memory subsystem synthesis and optimization framework for spatial accelerators. We first use space-time transformation (STT) to analyze both PE-level and memory-level data reuse. Based on the reuse analysis, we develop an algorithm to automatically generate data layout of the multi-banked scratchpad memory, data mapping, and access controller for the memory. Our generated memory subsystem supports multiple PE-memory interconnection topologies including direct, multicast, and rotated connection. The memory and interconnection generation approach can efficiently utilize the memory-level reuse to avoid duplicated data storage with low hardware cost. EMS can automatically synthesize tensor algebra to hardware designed in Chisel. Experiments show that our proposed memory generator reduces the on-chip memory size by an average of 28% than the state-of-the-art, and achieves comparable hardware performance.
items.abstract_zh:
空间加速器通过同构 PE 阵列提供大规模并行性，并通过 PE 阵列数据流和片上存储器实现高效数据重用。之前的许多工作都研究了空间加速器的数据流架构，包括性能分析和自动生成。然而，现有的加速器生成器无法利用整个内存级重用机会，并生成具有数据重复和低效互连的次优设计。

在本文中，我们提出了 EMS，一种用于空间加速器的高效内存子系统综合和优化框架。我们首先使用时空变换（STT）来分析 PE 级和内存级数据重用。基于重用分析，我们开发了一种算法来自动生成多组暂存器存储器的数据布局、数据映射和存储器的访问控制器。我们生成的内存子系统支持多种 PE-内存互连拓扑，包括直接、多播和旋转连接。存储器和互连生成方法可以有效地利用存储器级重用，以避免重复的数据存储，并且硬件成本低。 EMS 可以自动将张量代数合成到 Chisel 中设计的硬件中。实验表明，我们提出的内存生成器将片上内存大小比最先进的技术平均减少了 28%，并实现了可比的硬件性能。

items.title: TAIM: ternary activation in-memory computing hardware with 6T SRAM array.
items.abstract: Recently, various in-memory computing accelerators for low precision neural networks have been proposed. While in-memory Binary Neural Network (BNN) accelerators achieved significant energy efficiency, BNNs show severe accuracy degradation compared to their full precision counterpart models. To mitigate the problem, we propose TAIM, an in-memory computing hardware that can support ternary activation with negligible hardware overhead. In TAIM, a 6T SRAM cell can compute the multiplication between ternary activation and binary weight. Since the 6T SRAM cell consumes no energy when the input activation is 0, the proposed TAIM hardware can achieve even higher energy efficiency compared to BNN case by exploiting input 0's. We fabricated the proposed TAIM hardware in 28nm CMOS process and evaluated the energy efficiency on various image classification benchmarks. The experimental results show that the proposed TAIM hardware can achieve ~ 3.61× higher energy efficiency on average compared to previous designs which support ternary activation.
items.abstract_zh: 最近，已经提出了各种用于低精度神经网络的内存计算加速器。虽然内存二元神经网络 (BNN) 加速器实现了显着的能源效率，但与全精度对应模型相比，BNN 的精度严重下降。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了 TAIM，这是一种内存计算硬件，可以支持三元激活，而硬件开销可以忽略不计。在 TAIM 中，6T SRAM 单元可以计算三元激活和二进制权重之间的乘法。由于当输入激活为 0 时 6T SRAM 单元不消耗能量，因此与 BNN 情况相比，通过利用输入 0，所提出的 TAIM 硬件可以实现更高的能量效率。我们采用 28nm CMOS 工艺制造了所提出的 TAIM 硬件，并在各种图像分类基准上评估了能源效率。实验结果表明，与之前支持三元激活的设计相比，所提出的 TAIM 硬件平均能效提高约 3.61 倍。

items.title: Automating hardware security property generation: invited.
items.abstract: Security verification is an important part of the hardware design process. Security verification teams can uncover weaknesses, vulnerabilities, and flaws. Unfortunately, the verification process involves substantial manual analysis to create the threat model, identify important security assets, articulate weaknesses, define security requirements, and specify security properties that formally describe security requirements upon the hardware. This work describes current hardware security verification practices. Many of these rely on manual analysis. We argue that the property generation process is a first step towards scalable and reproducible hardware security verification.
items.abstract_zh: 安全验证是硬件设计过程的重要组成部分。安全验证团队可以发现弱点、漏洞和缺陷。不幸的是，验证过程涉及大量的手动分析，以创建威胁模型、识别重要的安全资产、阐明弱点、定义安全要求以及指定正式描述硬件安全要求的安全属性。这项工作描述了当前的硬件安全验证实践。其中许多依赖于手动分析。我们认为，属性生成过程是实现可扩展和可复制的硬件安全验证的第一步。

items.title: GENERIC: highly efficient learning engine on edge using hyperdimensional computing.
items.abstract: Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC) mimics the brain's basic principles in performing cognitive tasks by encoding the data to high-dimensional vectors and employing non-complex learning techniques. Conventional processing platforms such as CPUs and GPUs are incapable of taking full advantage of the highly-parallel bit-level operations of HDC. On the other hand, existing HDC encoding techniques do not cover a broad range of applications to make a custom design plausible. In this paper, we first propose a novel encoding that achieves high accuracy for diverse applications. Thereafter, we leverage the proposed encoding and design a highly efficient and flexible ASIC accelerator, dubbed GENERIC, suited for the edge domain. GENERIC supports both classification (train and inference) and clustering for unsupervised learning on edge. Our design is flexible in the input size (hence it can run various applications) and hypervectors dimensionality, allowing it to trade off the accuracy and energy/performance on-demand. We augment GENERIC with application-opportunistic power-gating and voltage over-scaling (thanks to the notable error resiliency of HDC) for further energy reduction. GENERIC encoding improves the prediction accuracy over previous HDC and ML techniques by 3.5% and 6.5%, respectively. At 14 nm technology node, GENERIC occupies an area of 0.30 mm 2 , and consumes 0.09 mW static and 1.97 mW active power. Compared to the previous inference-only accelerator, GENERIC reduces the energy consumption by 4.1×.
items.abstract_zh: 超维计算 (HDC) 通过将数据编码为高维向量并采用非复杂的学习技术来模仿大脑执行认知任务的基本原理。 CPU和GPU等传统处理平台无法充分利用HDC的高度并行位级操作。另一方面，现有的 HDC 编码技术并未涵盖广泛的应用，无法实现定制设计。在本文中，我们首先提出了一种新颖的编码，可以为各种应用实现高精度。此后，我们利用所提出的编码并设计了一个高效且灵活的 ASIC 加速器，称为 GENERIC，适用于边缘域。 GENERIC 支持边缘无监督学习的分类（训练和推理）和聚类。 Our design is flexible in the input size (hence it can run various applications) and hypervectors dimensionality, allowing it to trade off the accuracy and energy/performance on-demand.我们通过应用机会功率门控和电压超标度（得益于 HDC 显着的错误恢复能力）来增强 GENERIC，以进一步降低能耗。与之前的 HDC 和 ML 技术相比，GENERIC 编码的预测精度分别提高了 3.5% 和 6.5%。在14 nm技术节点，GENERIC占用的面积为0.30 mm 2 ，消耗0.09 mW静态功率和1.97 mW有功功率。与之前的仅推理加速器相比，GENERIC 的能耗降低了 4.1 倍。

items.title: PatterNet: explore and exploit filter patterns for efficient deep neural networks.
items.abstract: Weight clustering is an effective technique for compressing deep neural networks (DNNs) memory by using a limited number of unique weights and low-bit weight indexes to store clustering information. In this paper, we propose PatterNet, which enforces shared clustering topologies on filters. Cluster sharing leads to a greater extent of memory reduction by reusing the index information. PatterNet effectively factorizes input activations and post-processes the unique weights, which saves multiplications by several orders of magnitude. Furthermore, PatterNet reduces the add operations by harnessing the fact that filters sharing a clustering pattern have the same factorized terms. We introduce techniques for determining and assigning clustering patterns and training a network to fulfill the target patterns. We also propose and implement an efficient accelerator that builds upon the patterned filters. Experimental results show that PatterNet shrinks the memory and operation count up to 80.2% and 73.1%, respectively, with similar accuracy to the baseline models. PatterNet accelerator improves the energy efficiency by 107x over Nvidia 1080 1080 GTX and 2.2x over state of the art.
items.abstract_zh: 权重聚类是一种通过使用有限数量的唯一权重和低位权重索引来存储聚类信息来压缩深度神经网络 (DNN) 内存的有效技术。在本文中，我们提出了 PatterNet，它在过滤器上强制执行共享集群拓扑。集群共享通过重用索引信息可以更大程度地减少内存。 PatterNet 有效地分解输入激活并对唯一权重进行后处理，从而将乘法节省几个数量级。此外，PatterNet 通过利用共享聚类模式的过滤器具有相同分解项的事实来减少添加操作。我们介绍了确定和分配聚类模式以及训练网络以满足目标模式的技术。我们还提出并实现了一个基于图案过滤器的高效加速器。实验结果表明，PatterNet 将内存和操作数分别减少了 80.2% 和 73.1%，准确度与基线模型相似。 PatterNet 加速器的能效比 Nvidia 1080 1080 GTX 提高了 107 倍，比现有技术提高了 2.2 倍。

items.title: PARIS and ELSA: an elastic scheduling algorithm for reconfigurable multi-GPU inference servers.
items.abstract: page for arXiv paper 2202.13481: PARIS and ELSA: An Elastic Scheduling Algorithm for Reconfigurable Multi-GPU Inference Servers
items.abstract_zh: arXiv 论文 2202.13481 的页面：PARIS 和 ELSA：可重新配置多 GPU 推理服务器的弹性调度算法

items.title: Voltage prediction of drone battery reflecting internal temperature.
items.abstract: Drones are commonly used in mission-critical applications, and the accurate estimation of available battery capacity before flight is critical for reliable and efficient mission planning. To this end, the battery voltage should be predicted accurately prior to launching a drone. However, in drone applications, a rise in the battery's internal temperature changes the voltage significantly and leads to challenges in voltage prediction. In this paper, we propose a battery voltage prediction method that takes into account the battery's internal temperature to accurately estimate the available capacity of the drone battery. To this end, we devise a temporal temperature factor (TTF) metric that is calculated by accumulating time series data about the battery's discharge history. We employ a machine learning-based prediction model, reflecting the TTF metric, to achieve high prediction accuracy and low complexity. We validated the accuracy and complexity of our model with extensive evaluation. The results show that the proposed model is accurate with less than 1.5% error and readily operates on resource-constrained embedded devices.
items.abstract_zh: 无人机通常用于关键任务应用，在飞行前准确估计可用电池容量对于可靠、高效的任务规划至关重要。为此，应在发射无人机之前准确预测电池电压。然而，在无人机应用中，电池内部温度的升高会显着改变电压，并给电压预测带来挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种电池电压预测方法，该方法考虑电池的内部温度，以准确估计无人机电池的可用容量。为此，我们设计了一个时间温度因子（TTF）指标，该指标是通过累积有关电池放电历史的时间序列数据来计算的。我们采用基于机器学习的预测模型，反映 TTF 指标，以实现高预测精度和低复杂度。我们通过广泛的评估验证了模型的准确性和复杂性。结果表明，所提出的模型准确，误差小于 1.5%，并且易于在资源受限的嵌入式设备上运行。

items.title: Waveform-based performance analysis of RISC-V processors: late breaking results.
items.abstract: In this paper, we demonstrate the use of the open-source domain specific language WAL to analyze performance metrics of RISC-V processors. The WAL programs calculate these metrics by evaluating the processors signals while "walking" over the simulation waveform (VCD). The presented WAL programs are flexible and generic, and can be easily adapted to different RISC-V cores.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们演示了使用开源领域特定语言 WAL 来分析 RISC-V 处理器的性能指标。 WAL 程序通过在模拟波形 (VCD) 上“行走”时评估处理器信号来计算这些指标。所提出的 WAL 程序灵活且通用，可以轻松适应不同的 RISC-V 内核。

items.title: Silicon validation of LUT-based logic-locked IP cores.
items.abstract: Modern semiconductor manufacturing often leverages a fabless model in which design and fabrication are partitioned. This has led to a large body of work attempting to secure designs sent to an untrusted third party through obfuscation methods. On the other hand, efficient de-obfuscation attacks have been proposed, such as Boolean Satisfiability attacks (SAT attacks). However, there is a lack of frameworks to validate the security and functionality of obfuscated designs. Additionally, unconventional obfuscated design flows, which vary from one obfuscation to another, have been key impending factors in realizing logic locking as a mainstream approach for securing designs. In this work, we address these two issues for Lookup Table-based obfuscation. We study both Volatile and Non-volatile versions of LUT-based obfuscation and develop a framework to validate SAT runtime using machine learning. We can achieve unparallel SAT-resiliency using LUT-based obfuscation while incurring 7% area and less than 1% power overheads. Following this, we discuss and implement a validation flow for obfuscated designs. We then fabricate a chip consisting of several benchmark designs and a RISC-V CPU in TSMC 65nm for post functionality validation. We show that the design flow and SAT-runtime validation can easily integrate LUT-based obfuscation into existing CAD tools while adding minimal verification overhead. Finally, we justify SAT-resilient LUT-based obfuscation as a promising candidate for securing designs.
items.abstract_zh: 现代半导体制造通常采用无晶圆厂模型，其中设计和制造是分开的。这导致大量工作试图通过混淆方法来保护发送给不受信任的第三方的设计。另一方面，已经提出了有效的反混淆攻击，例如布尔可满足性攻击（SAT 攻击）。然而，缺乏框架来验证混淆设计的安全性和功能。此外，非常规的混淆设计流程（从一种混淆到另一种混淆）一直是实现逻辑锁定作为保护设计的主流方法的关键迫在眉睫的因素。在这项工作中，我们解决了基于查找表的混淆的这两个问题。我们研究基于 LUT 的混淆的易失性和非易失性版本，并开发一个框架来使用机器学习来验证 SAT 运行时。我们可以使用基于 LUT 的混淆实现无与伦比的 SAT 弹性，同时减少 7% 的面积和不到 1% 的功率开销。接下来，我们讨论并实现混淆设计的验证流程。然后，我们在 TSMC 65nm 中制造由多个基准设计和 RISC-V CPU 组成的芯片，以进行后期功能验证。我们表明，设计流程和 SAT 运行时验证可以轻松地将基于 LUT 的混淆集成到现有 CAD 工具中，同时增加最小的验证开销。最后，我们证明基于 LUT 的 SAT 弹性混淆是保护设计安全的有希望的候选者。

items.title: LOCK&ROLL: deep-learning power side-channel attack mitigation using emerging reconfigurable devices and logic locking.
items.abstract: The security and trustworthiness of ICs are exacerbated by the modern globalized semiconductor business model. This model involves many steps performed at multiple locations by different providers and integrates various Intellectual Properties (IPs) from several vendors for faster time-to-market and cheaper fabrication costs. Many existing works have focused on mitigating the well-known SAT attack and its derivatives. Power Side-Channel Attacks (PSCAs) can retrieve the sensitive contents of the IP and can be leveraged to find the key to unlock the obfuscated circuit without simulating powerful SAT attacks. To mitigate P-SCA and SAT-attack together, we propose a multi-layer defense mechanism called LOCK&ROLL: Deep-Learning Power Side-Channel Attack Mitigation using Emerging Reconfigurable Devices and Logic Locking. LOCK&ROLL utilizes our proposed Magnetic Random-Access Memory (MRAM)-based Look Up Table called Symmetrical MRAM-LUT (SyM-LUT). Our simulation results using 45nm technology demonstrate that the SyM-LUT incurs a small overhead compared to traditional Static Random Access Memory LUT (SRAM-LUT). Additionally, SyM-LUT has a standby energy consumption of 20aJ while consuming 33fJ and 4.6fJ for write and read operations, respectively. LOCK&ROLL is resilient against various attacks such as SAT-attacks, removal attack, scan and shift attacks, and P-SCA.
items.abstract_zh: The security and trustworthiness of ICs are exacerbated by the modern globalized semiconductor business model.该模型涉及不同提供商在多个地点执行的许多步骤，并集成了多个供应商的各种知识产权 (IP)，以加快上市时间并降低制造成本。 Many existing works have focused on mitigating the well-known SAT attack and its derivatives.电源侧通道攻击 (PSCA) 可以检索 IP 的敏感内容，并可用于找到解锁混淆电路的密钥，而无需模拟强大的 SAT 攻击。为了共同缓解 P-SCA 和 SAT 攻击，我们提出了一种称为 LOCK&ROLL 的多层防御机制：使用新兴可重构设备和逻辑锁定的深度学习电源侧通道攻击缓解。 LOCK&ROLL utilizes our proposed Magnetic Random-Access Memory (MRAM)-based Look Up Table called Symmetrical MRAM-LUT (SyM-LUT).我们使用 45nm 技术的仿真结果表明，与传统的静态随机存取存储器 LUT (SRAM-LUT) 相比，SyM-LUT 的开销较小。 Additionally, SyM-LUT has a standby energy consumption of 20aJ while consuming 33fJ and 4.6fJ for write and read operations, respectively. LOCK&ROLL is resilient against various attacks such as SAT-attacks, removal attack, scan and shift attacks, and P-SCA.

items.title: GEML: GNN-based efficient mapping method for large loop applications on CGRA.
items.abstract: Coarse-grained reconfigurable architecture (CGRA) is an emerging hardware architecture, with reconfigurable Processing Elements (PEs) for executing operations efficiently and flexibly. One major challenge for current CGRA compilers is the scalability issue for large loop applications, where valid loop mapping results cannot be obtained in an acceptable time. This paper proposes an enhanced loop mapping method based on Graph Neural Network (GNN), which effectively addresses the scalability issue and generates valid loop mapping results for large applications. Experimental results show that the proposed method enhances the compilation time by 10.8x on average over existing methods, with even better loop mapping solutions.
items.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构架构（CGRA）是一种新兴的硬件架构，具有可重构处理元件（PE），可以高效、灵活地执行操作。当前 CGRA 编译器面临的一项主要挑战是大型循环应用程序的可扩展性问题，其中无法在可接受的时间内获得有效的循环映射结果。本文提出了一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的增强循环映射方法，有效解决了可扩展性问题，并为大型应用程序生成有效的循环映射结果。实验结果表明，所提出的方法比现有方法平均编译时间提高了 10.8 倍，并且具有更好的循环映射解决方案。

items.title: Efficiency attacks on spiking neural networks.
items.abstract: Spiking Neural Networks are a class of artificial neural networks that process information as discrete spikes. The time and energy consumed in SNN implementations is strongly dependent on the number of spikes processed. We explore this sensitivity from an adversarial perspective and propose SpikeAttack, a completely new class of attacks on SNNs. SpikeAttack impacts the efficiency of SNNs via imperceptible perturbations that increase the overall spiking activity of the network, leading to increased time and energy consumption. Across four SNN benchmarks, SpikeAttackresults in 1.7x-2.5X increase in spike activity, leading to increases of 1.6x-2.3x and 1.4x-2.2x in latency and energy consumption, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络是一类将信息处理为离散尖峰的人工神经网络。 SNN 实现中消耗的时间和能量很大程度上取决于处理的尖峰数量。我们从对抗的角度探讨了这种敏感性，并提出了 SpikeAttack，这是一种针对 SNN 的全新攻击类别。 SpikeAttack 通过难以察觉的扰动影响 SNN 的效率，这些扰动会增加网络的整体尖峰活动，从而导致时间和能源消耗增加。在四个 SNN 基准测试中，SpikeAttack 导致尖峰活动增加 1.7 倍至 2.5 倍，从而导致延迟和能耗分别增加 1.6 倍至 2.3 倍和 1.4 倍至 2.2 倍。

items.title: Exploiting data locality in memory for ORAM to reduce memory access overheads.
items.abstract: This paper proposes a locality-aware Oblivious RAM (ORAM) primitive, named Green ORAM, which exploits spatial locality of data in the physical memory for reducing ORAM overheads. The Green ORAM is novel consisting of three policies. The first is row-guided label allocation used for mapping spatial locality onto ORAM tree to reduce the number of memory commands. The second is segment-based path replacement able to improve the data locality within the path in the ORAM tree in order to remove the redundant memory accesses. The third is multi-path write-back able to improve the data locality between different paths in order to obtain theoretical best stash hit rate. Notably, the Green ORAM still maintains the security as we analyzed. Experimental results show that Green ORAM achieves a 28.72% access latency reduction, and a 19.06% memory energy consumption reduction on average, compared with the state-of-the-art String ORAM.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种名为 Green ORAM 的局部感知 Oblivious RAM (ORAM) 原语，它利用物理内存中数据的空间局部性来减少 ORAM 开销。绿色 ORAM 很新颖，由三项政策组成。第一个是行引导标签分配，用于将空间局部性映射到 ORAM 树上，以减少内存命令的数量。第二个是基于段的路径替换，能够改善 ORAM 树中路径内的数据局部性，以便删除冗余内存访问。第三是多路径回写，能够提高不同路径之间的数据局部性，以获得理论上的最佳存储命中率。值得注意的是，Green ORAM 仍然保持了我们分析的安全性。实验结果表明，与最先进的 String ORAM 相比，Green ORAM 的访问延迟平均降低了 28.72%，内存能耗平均降低了 19.06%。

items.title: Bipolar vector classifier for fault-tolerant deep neural networks.
items.abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) surpass the human-level performance on specific tasks. The outperforming capability accelerate an adoption of DNNs to safety-critical applications such as autonomous vehicles and medical diagnosis. Millions of parameters in DNN requires a high memory capacity. A process technology scaling allows increasing memory density, however, the memory reliability confronts significant reliability issues causing errors in the memory. This can make stored weights in memory erroneous. Studies show that the erroneous weights can cause a significant accuracy loss. This motivates research on fault-tolerant DNN architectures. Despite of these efforts, DNNs are still vulnerable to errors, especially error in DNN classifier. In the worst case, because a classifier in convolutional neural network (CNN) is the last stage determining an input class, a single error in the classifier can cause a significant accuracy drop. To enhance the fault tolerance in CNN, this paper proposes a novel bipolar vector classifier which can be easily integrated with any CNN structures and can be incorporated with other fault tolerance approaches. Experimental results show that the proposed method stably maintains an accuracy with a high bit error rate up to 10 −3 in the classifier.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）在特定任务上的表现超越了人类水平。出色的功能加速了 DNN 在自动驾驶汽车和医疗诊断等安全关键应用中的采用。 DNN 中的数百万个参数需要高存储容量。工艺技术缩放允许增加存储器密度，然而，存储器可靠性面临导致存储器错误的重大可靠性问题。这可能会使内存中存储的权重出现错误。研究表明，错误的权重可能会导致准确度显着下降。这激发了对容错 DNN 架构的研究。尽管做出了这些努力，DNN 仍然容易出错，尤其是 DNN 分类器中的错误。在最坏的情况下，由于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 中的分类器是确定输入类别的最后阶段，因此分类器中的单个错误可能会导致准确度显着下降。为了增强 CNN 的容错能力，本文提出了一种新颖的双极向量分类器，它可以轻松地与任何 CNN 结构集成，并且可以与其他容错方法结合。实验结果表明，该方法在分类器中稳定地保持了准确率，误码率高达10 -3 。

items.title: TailCut: improving performance and lifetime of SSDs using pattern-aware state encoding.
items.abstract: Although lateral charge spreading is considered as a dominant error source in 3D NAND flash memory, little is known about its detailed characteristics at the storage system level. From a device characterization study, we observed that lateral charge spreading strongly depends on vertically adjacent state patterns and a few specific patterns are responsible for a large portion of bit errors from lateral charge spreading. We propose a new state encoding scheme, called TailCut, which removes vulnerable state patterns by modifying encoded states. By removing vulnerable patterns, TailCut can improve the SSD lifetime and read latency by 80% and 25%, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 尽管横向电荷扩散被认为是 3D NAND 闪存中的主要误差源，但人们对其在存储系统级别的详细特性知之甚少。从器件特性研究中，我们观察到横向电荷扩散强烈依赖于垂直相邻状态模式，并且一些特定模式导致横向电荷扩散产生的大部分比特错误。我们提出了一种新的状态编码方案，称为 TailCut，它通过修改编码状态来删除易受攻击的状态模式。通过消除易受攻击的模式，TailCut 可以将 SSD 寿命和读取延迟分别提高 80% 和 25%。

items.title: Don't open row: rethinking row buffer policy for improving performance of non-volatile memories.
items.abstract: Among the various NVM technologies, phase-change-memory (PCM) has attracted substantial attention as a candidate to replace the DRAM for next-generation memory. However, the characteristics of PCM cause it to have much longer read and write latencies than DRAM. This paper proposes a Write-Around PCM System that addresses this limitation using two novel schemes: Pseudo-Row Activation and Direct Write. Pseudo-Row Activation provides fast row activation for PCM writes by connecting a target row to bitlines, but it does not fetch the data into the row buffer. With the Direct Write scheme, our system allows for writing operations to update the data even if the target row is in the logically closed state.
items.abstract_zh: 在各种 NVM 技术中，相变存储器 (PCM) 作为下一代存储器替代 DRAM 的候选技术引起了广泛关注。但PCM的特性导致其读写延迟比DRAM要长得多。本文提出了一种 Write-Around PCM 系统，该系统使用两种新颖的方案解决了这一限制：伪行激活和直接写入。伪行激活通过将目标行连接到位线来为 PCM 写入提供快速行激活，但它不会将数据提取到行缓冲区中。通过直接写入方案，即使目标行处于逻辑关闭状态，我们的系统也允许写入操作来更新数据。

items.title: Beyond local optimality of buffer and splitter insertion for AQFP circuits.
items.abstract: Adiabatic quantum-flux parametron (AQFP) is an energy-efficient superconducting technology. Buffer and splitter (B/S) cells must be inserted to an AQFP circuit to meet the technology-imposed constraints on path balancing and fanout branching. These cells account for a significant amount of the circuit's area and delay. In this paper, we identify that B/S insertion is a scheduling problem, and propose (a) a linear-time algorithm for locally optimal B/S insertion subject to a given schedule; (b) an SMT formulation to find the global optimum; and (c) an efficient heuristic for global B/S optimization. Experimental results show a reduction of 4% on the B/S cost and 124X speed-up compared to the state-of-the-art algorithm, and capability to scale to a magnitude larger benchmarks.
items.abstract_zh: 绝热量子通量参量管（AQFP）是一种节能超导技术。缓冲器和分离器 (B/S) 单元必须插入到 AQFP 电路中，以满足路径平衡和扇出分支的技术限制。这些单元占据了电路面积和延迟的很大一部分。在本文中，我们确定 B/S 插入是一个调度问题，并提出了（a）一种针对给定调度的局部最优 B/S 插入的线性时间算法； (b) SMT 公式以找到全局最优值； (c) 全局 B/S 优化的有效启发式方法。实验结果表明，与最先进的算法相比，B/S 成本降低了 4%，加速提高了 124 倍，并且能够扩展到更大的基准。

items.title: CarM: hierarchical episodic memory for continual learning.
items.abstract: Continual Learning (CL) is an emerging machine learning paradigm in mobile or IoT devices that learns from a continuous stream of tasks. To avoid forgetting of knowledge of the previous tasks, episodic memory (EM) methods exploit a subset of the past samples while learning from new data. Despite the promising results, prior studies are mostly simulation-based and unfortunately do not promise to meet an insatiable demand for both EM capacity and system efficiency in practical system setups. We propose CarM, the first CL framework that meets the demand by a novel hierarchical EM management strategy. CarM has EM on high-speed RAMs for system efficiency and exploits the abundant storage to preserve past experiences and alleviate the forgetting by allowing CL to efficiently migrate samples between memory and storage. Extensive evaluations show that our method significantly outperforms popular CL methods while providing high training efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 持续学习（CL）是移动或物联网设备中新兴的机器学习范例，它从连续的任务流中学习。为了避免忘记先前任务的知识，情景记忆（EM）方法在从新数据中学习的同时利用过去样本的子集。尽管结果令人鼓舞，但先前的研究大多基于模拟，不幸的是并不能满足实际系统设置中对电磁容量和系统效率的无限需求。我们提出了 CarM，这是第一个通过新颖的分层 EM 管理策略满足需求的 CL 框架。 CarM 在高速 RAM 上配备 EM，以提高系统效率，并利用丰富的存储空间来保存过去的经验，并通过允许 CL 在内存和存储之间有效地迁移样本来减少遗忘。广泛的评估表明，我们的方法显着优于流行的 CL 方法，同时提供高训练效率。

items.title: A time-to-first-spike coding and conversion aware training for energy-efficient deep spiking neural network processor design.
items.abstract: In this paper, we present an energy-efficient SNN architecture, which can seamlessly run deep spiking neural networks (SNNs) with improved accuracy. First, we propose a conversion aware training (CAT) to reduce ANN-to-SNN conversion loss without hardware implementation overhead. In the proposed CAT, the activation function developed for simulating SNN during ANN training, is efficiently exploited to reduce the data representation error after conversion. Based on the CAT technique, we also present a time-to-first-spike coding that allows lightweight logarithmic computation by utilizing spike time information. The SNN processor design that supports the proposed techniques has been implemented using 28nm CMOS process. The processor achieves the top-1 accuracies of 91.7%, 67.9% and 57.4% with inference energy of 486.7uJ, 503.6uJ, and 1426uJ to process CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet, respectively, when running VGG-16 with 5bit logarithmic weights.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种节能的 SNN 架构，它可以无缝运行深度尖峰神经网络 (SNN)，并提高准确性。首先，我们提出了一种转换感知训练（CAT），以减少 ANN 到 SNN 的转换损失，而无需硬件实现开销。在所提出的 CAT 中，有效地利用了为在 ANN 训练期间模拟 SNN 而开发的激活函数，以减少转换后的数据表示误差。基于 CAT 技术，我们还提出了一种首次尖峰时间编码，该编码允许利用尖峰时间信息进行轻量级对数计算。支持所提出技术的 SNN 处理器设计已使用 28nm CMOS 工艺实现。当以 5 位对数权重运行 VGG-16 时，该处理器处理 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 Tiny-ImageNet 的推理能量分别为 486.7uJ、503.6uJ 和 1426uJ，实现了 91.7%、67.9% 和 57.4% 的 top-1 准确率。

items.title: ReSMA: accelerating approximate string matching using ReRAM-based content addressable memory.
items.abstract: Approximate string matching (ASM) functions as the basic operation kernel for a large number of string processing applications. Existing Von-Neumann-based ASM accelerators suffer from huge intermediate data with the ever-increasing string data, leading to massive off-chip data transmissions. This paper presents a novel ASM processing-in-memory (PIM) accelerator, namely ReSMA, based on ReCAM- and ReRAM-arrays to eliminate the off-chip data transmissions in ASM. We develop a novel ReCAM-friendly filter-and-filtering algorithm to process the q -grams filtering in ReCAM memory. We also design a new data mapping strategy and a new verification algorithm, which enables computing the edit distances totally in ReRAM crossbars for energy saving. Experimental results show that ReSMA outperforms the CPU-, GPU-, FPGA-, ASIC-, and PIM-based solutions by 268.7×, 38.6×, 20.9×, 707.8×, and 14.7× in terms of performance, and 153.8×, 42.2×, 31.6×, 18.3×, and 5.3× in terms of energy-saving, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 近似字符串匹配（ASM）作为大量字符串处理应用的基本运算内核。现有的基于冯诺依曼的ASM加速器面临着巨大的中间数据和不断增加的字符串数据，导致大量的片外数据传输。本文提出了一种新型 ASM 内存处理 (PIM) 加速器，即 ReSMA，它基于 ReCAM 和 ReRAM 阵列，以消除 ASM 中的片外数据传输。我们开发了一种新颖的 ReCAM 友好的过滤和过滤算法来处理 ReCAM 内存中的 q 元过滤。我们还设计了一种新的数据映射策略和一种新的验证算法，可以完全在 ReRAM 交叉开关中计算编辑距离以节省能源。实验结果表明，ReSMA在性能方面优于基于CPU、GPU、FPGA、ASIC和PIM的解决方案268.7×、38.6×、20.9×、707.8×和14.7×，在性能方面优于基于CPU、GPU、FPGA、ASIC和PIM的解决方案153.8×、42.2×、31.6×、18.3×和5.3×。分别节能。

items.title: Eventor: an efficient event-based monocular multi-view stereo accelerator on FPGA platform.
items.abstract: Event cameras are bio-inspired vision sensors that asynchronously represent pixel-level brightness changes as event streams. Event-based monocular multi-view stereo (EMVS) is a technique that exploits the event streams to estimate semi-dense 3D structure with known trajectory. It is a critical task for event-based monocular SLAM. However, the required intensive computation workloads make it challenging for real-time deployment on embedded platforms. In this paper, Eventor is proposed as a fast and efficient EMVS accelerator by realizing the most critical and time-consuming stages including event back-projection and volumetric ray-counting on FPGA. Highly paralleled and fully pipelined processing elements are specially designed via FPGA and integrated with the embedded ARM as a heterogeneous system to improve the throughput and reduce the memory footprint. Meanwhile, the EMVS algorithm is reformulated to a more hardware-friendly manner by rescheduling, approximate computing and hybrid data quantization. Evaluation results on DAVIS dataset show that Eventor achieves up to 24X improvement in energy efficiency compared with Intel i5 CPU platform.
items.abstract_zh: 事件相机是仿生视觉传感器，可将像素级亮度变化异步表示为事件流。基于事件的单目多视立体 (EMVS) 是一种利用事件流来估计具有已知轨迹的半密集 3D 结构的技术。这是基于事件的单目 SLAM 的一项关键任务。然而，所需的密集计算工作负载给嵌入式平台上的实时部署带来了挑战。在本文中，Eventor 被提出作为一种快速高效的 EMVS 加速器，通过在 FPGA 上实现最关键和最耗时的阶段（包括事件反投影和体积射线计数）。高度并行和全流水线处理元件通过 FPGA 专门设计，并与嵌入式 ARM 集成为异构系统，以提高吞吐量并减少内存占用。同时，通过重新调度、近似计算和混合数据量化，将EMVS算法重新表述为更加硬件友好的方式。 DAVIS 数据集的评估结果显示，与 Intel i5 CPU 平台相比，Eventor 的能效提升高达 24 倍。

items.title: HIMap: a heuristic and iterative logic synthesis approach.
items.abstract: Recently, many models show their superiority in sequence and parameter tuning. However, they usually generate non-deterministic flows and require lots of training data. We thus propose a heuristic and iterative flow, namely HIMap, for deterministic logic synthesis. In which, domain knowledge of the functionality and parameters of synthesis operators and their correlations to netlist PPA is fully utilized to design synthesis templates for various objetives. We also introduce deterministic and effective heuristics to tune the templates with relatively fixed operator combinations and iteratively improve netlist PPA. Two nested iterations with local searching and early stopping can thus generate dynamic sequence for various circuits and reduce runtime. HIMap improves 13 best results of the EPFL combinational benchmarks for delay (5 for area). Especially, for several arithmetic benchmarks, HIMap significantly reduces LUT-6 levels by 11.6 ~ 21.2% and delay after P&R by 5.0 ~ 12.9%.
items.abstract_zh: 最近，许多模型在序列和参数调整方面显示出了它们的优越性。然而，它们通常会生成不确定的流并且需要大量的训练数据。因此，我们提出了一种启发式迭代流程，即 HIMap，用于确定性逻辑综合。其中，充分利用综合算子的功能和参数及其与网表 PPA 的相关性的领域知识来设计各种目标的综合模板。我们还引入了确定性和有效的启发式方法来调整具有相对固定的运算符组合的模板，并迭代改进网表 PPA。因此，具有局部搜索和早期停止的两个嵌套迭代可以为各种电路生成动态序列并减少运行时间。 HIMap 改进了 EPFL 延迟组合基准的 13 项最佳结果（面积 5 项）。特别是，对于多个算术基准，HIMap 将 LUT-6 级别显着降低了 11.6 ~ 21.2%，并将 P&R 后的延迟降低了 5.0 ~ 12.9%。

items.title: Conditional address propagation: an efficient defense mechanism against transient execution attacks.
items.abstract: Speculative execution is a critical technique in modern high performance processors. However, continuously exposed transient execution attacks, including Spectre and Meltdown, disclosed a large attack surface in mispredicted execution. Current state-of-the-art defense strategy blocks all memory accesses that use addresses loaded speculatively. However, propagation of base addresses is common in general applications and we find that more than 60% blocked memory accesses use propagated base rather than offset addresses. Therefore, we propose a novel hardware defense mechanism, named Conditional Address Propagation, to identify safe base addresses through taint tracking and address checking by a History Table. Then, the safe base addresses are allowed to be propagated to retrieve performance. For remaining unsafe addresses, they cannot be propagated for security. We constructed experiments on cycle-accurate Gem5 simulator. Compared to the representative study, STT, our mechanism effectively decreases the performance overhead from 13.27% to 1.92% targeting Spectre-type and 19.66% to 5.23% targeting all-type cache-based transient execution attacks.
items.abstract_zh: 推测执行是现代高性能处理器中的一项关键技术。然而，持续暴露的瞬态执行攻击（包括 Spectre 和 Meltdown）暴露了错误预测执行中的巨大攻击面。当前最先进的防御策略会阻止所有使用推测加载地址的内存访问。然而，基地址传播在一般应用中很常见，我们发现超过 60% 的阻塞内存访问使用传播基地址而不是偏移地址。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的硬件防御机制，称为条件地址传播，通过历史表的污点跟踪和地址检查来识别安全基地址。然后，允许传播安全基地址以检索性能。对于剩余的不安全地址，出于安全考虑，它们不能被传播。我们在周期精确的 Gem5 模拟器上构建了实验。与代表性研究 STT 相比，我们的机制有效地将针对 Spectre 类型的性能开销从 13.27% 降低到 1.92%，针对所有类型的基于缓存的瞬时执行攻击从 19.66% 降低到 5.23%。

items.title: GraphRing: an HMC-ring based graph processing framework with optimized data movement.
items.abstract: Due to the irregular memory access and high bandwidth demanding, graph processing is usually inefficient on conventional computer architectures. The recent development of the processing-in-memory (PIM) technique such as hybrid memory cube (HMC) has provided a feasible design direction for graph processing accelerators. Although PIM provides high internal bandwidth, inter-node memory access is inevitable in large-scale graph processing, which greatly affects the performance. In this paper, we propose an HMC-based graph processing framework, GraphRing. GraphRing is a software-hardware codesign framework that optimizes inter-HMC communication. It contains a regularity- and locality-aware graph execution model and a ring-based multi-HMC architecture. The evaluation results based on 5 graph datasets and 4 graph algorithms show that GraphRing achieves on average 2.14× speedup and 3.07× inter-HMC communication energy saving, compared with GraphQ, a state-of-the-art graph processing architecture.
items.abstract_zh: 由于不规则的内存访问和高带宽需求，传统计算机架构上的图处理通常效率低下。混合内存立方体（HMC）等内存处理（PIM）技术的最新发展为图处理加速器提供了可行的设计方向。虽然PIM提供了较高的内部带宽，但在大规模图处理中不可避免地会出现节点间内存访问，这极大地影响了性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 HMC 的图处理框架 GraphRing。 GraphRing 是一个软件-硬件协同设计框架，可优化 HMC 间的通信。它包含规律性和局部性感知图执行模型以及基于环的多 HMC 架构。基于5个图数据集和4种图算法的评估结果表明，与最先进的图处理架构GraphQ相比，GraphRing平均实现了2.14倍的加速和3.07倍的HMC间通信节能。

items.title: iMARS: an in-memory-computing architecture for recommendation systems.
items.abstract: Recommendation systems (RecSys) suggest items to users by predicting their preferences based on historical data. Typical RecSys handle large embedding tables and many embedding table related operations. The memory size and bandwidth of the conventional computer architecture restrict the performance of RecSys. This work proposes an in-memory-computing (IMC) architecture (iMARS) for accelerating the filtering and ranking stages of deep neural network-based RecSys. iMARS leverages IMC-friendly embedding tables implemented inside a ferroelectric FET based IMC fabric. Circuit-level and system-level evaluation show that iMARS achieves 16.8x (713x) end-to-end latency (energy) improvement compared to the GPU counterpart for the MovieLens dataset.
items.abstract_zh: 推荐系统 (RecSys) 通过根据历史数据预测用户的偏好来向用户推荐项目。典型的 RecSys 处理大型嵌入表和许多嵌入表相关的操作。传统计算机架构的内存大小和带宽限制了RecSys的性能。这项工作提出了一种内存计算（IMC）架构（iMARS），用于加速基于深度神经网络的 RecSys 的过滤和排序阶段。 iMARS 利用在基于铁电 FET 的 IMC 结构内实现的 IMC 友好嵌入表。电路级和系统级评估表明，与 MovieLens 数据集的 GPU 对应产品相比，iMARS 实现了 16.8 倍（713 倍）的端到端延迟（能量）改进。

items.title: A scalable SIMD RISC-V based processor with customized vector extensions for CRYSTALS-kyber.
items.abstract: This paper uses RISC-V vector extensions to speed up lattice-based operations in architectures based on HW/SW co-design. We analyze the structure of the number-theoretic transform (NTT), inverse NTT (INTT), and coefficient-wise multiplication (CWM) in CRYSTALS-Kyber, a lattice-based key encapsulation mechanism. We propose 12 vector extensions for CRYSTALS-Kyber multiplication and four for finite field operations in combination with two optimizations of the HW/SW interface. This results in a speed-up of 141.7, 168.7, and 245.5 times for NTT, INTT, and CWM, respectively, compared with the baseline implementation, and a speed-up of over four times compared with the state-of-the-art HW/SW co-design using RV32IMC.
items.abstract_zh: 本文使用 RISC-V 向量扩展来加速基于硬件/软件协同设计的架构中基于晶格的操作。我们分析了 CRYSTALS-Kyber（一种基于格的密钥封装机制）中的数论变换 (NTT)、逆 NTT (INTT) 和系数乘法 (CWM) 的结构。我们提出了 12 个用于 CRYSTALS-Kyber 乘法的向量扩展和 4 个用于有限域运算的向量扩展，并结合了 HW/SW 接口的两种优化。与基线实现相比，NTT、INTT 和 CWM 的加速分别为 141.7、168.7 和 245.5 倍，与使用 RV32IMC 的最先进的硬件/软件协同设计相比，加速超过四倍。

items.title: SS-LRU: a smart segmented LRU caching.
items.abstract: Many caching policies use machine learning to predict data reuse, but they ignore the impact of incorrect prediction on cache performance, especially for large-size objects. In this paper, we propose a smart segmented LRU (SS-LRU) replacement policy, which adopts a size-aware classifier designed for cache scenarios and considers the cache cost caused by misprediction. Besides, SS-LRU enhances the migration rules of segmented LRU (SLRU) and implements a smart caching with unequal priorities and segment sizes based on prediction and multiple access patterns. We conducted Extensive experiments under the real-world workloads to demonstrate the superiority of our approach over state-of-the-art caching policies.
items.abstract_zh: 许多缓存策略使用机器学习来预测数据重用，但它们忽略了错误预测对缓存性能的影响，尤其是对于大尺寸对象。在本文中，我们提出了一种智能分段LRU（SS-LRU）替换策略，该策略采用针对缓存场景设计的大小感知分类器，并考虑错误预测导致的缓存成本。此外，SS-LRU增强了分段LRU（SLRU）的迁移规则，并基于预测和多访问模式实现了具有不等优先级和段大小的智能缓存。我们在现实世界的工作负载下进行了广泛的实验，以证明我们的方法相对于最先进的缓存策略的优越性。

items.title: Tailor: removing redundant operations in memristive analog neural network accelerators.
items.abstract:
Analog in-situ computation based on memristive circuits has been regarded as a promising approach for designing high-performance and low-power neural network accelerators. However, despite the low-cost and highly parallel memristive crossbars, the peripheral circuits especially analog-digital-converters (ADCs) induce significant overhead. Quantitative analysis shows that ADCs can contribute up to 91% energy consumption and 72% chip area, which significantly offset the advantages of memristive NN accelerators.

To address this problem, we first mathematically analyze the computation flow in a memristive accelerator, and find that there are many useless operations. These operations significantly increase the demand for peripheral circuits. Then, based on our discovery, we propose a novel architecture, Tailor, which removes these unnecessary operations without accuracy loss. We design two types of Tailor. General Tailor is compatible with most existing memristive accelerators and can be easily applied to them. Customized Tailor is specialized for a certain NN application and can obtain more improvement. Experimental results show that, General Tailor can reduce 14% ~ 20% inference time and 33% ~ 41% energy consumption. Customized Tailor can further achieve 56% ~ 87% higher computation density.
items.abstract_zh:
基于忆阻电路的模拟原位计算被认为是设计高性能和低功耗神经网络加速器的一种有前途的方法。然而，尽管忆阻交叉开关成本低且高度并行，但外围电路尤其是模数转换器（ADC）会产生大量开销。定量分析表明，ADC 可贡献高达 91% 的能耗和 72% 的芯片面积，这显着抵消了忆阻神经网络加速器的优势。

为了解决这个问题，我们首先对忆阻加速器中的计算流程进行数学分析，发现存在很多无用的操作。这些操作显着增加了对外围电路的需求。然后，根据我们的发现，我们提出了一种新颖的架构，Tailor，它消除了这些不必要的操作，而不会损失准确性。我们设计了两种类型的 Tailor。 General Tailor 与大多数现有忆阻加速器兼容，并且可以轻松应用于它们。 Customized Tailor专门针对某个神经网络应用，可以获得更多的改进。实验结果表明，General Tailor可以减少14%~20%的推理时间和33%~41%的能耗。定制化Tailor可以进一步实现计算密度提高56%~87%。

items.title: ASTERS: adaptable threshold spike-timing neuromorphic design with twin-column ReRAM synapses.
items.abstract: Complex event-driven neuron dynamics was an obstacle to implementing efficient brain-inspired computing architectures with VLSI circuits. To solve this problem and harness the event-driven advantage, we propose ASTERS, a resistive random-access memory (ReRAM) based neuromorphic design to conduct the time-to-first-spike SNN inference. In addition to the fundamental novel axon and neuron circuits, we also propose two techniques through hardware-software co-design: "Multi-Level Firing Threshold Adjustment" to mitigate the impact of ReRAM device process variations, and "Timing Threshold Adjustment" to further speed up the computation. Experimental results show that our cross-layer solution ASTERS achieves more than 34.7% energy savings compared to the existing spiking neuromorphic designs, meanwhile maintaining 90.1% accuracy under the process variations with a 20% standard deviation.
items.abstract_zh: 复杂的事件驱动神经元动力学是利用 VLSI 电路实现高效的类脑计算架构的障碍。为了解决这个问题并利用事件驱动的优势，我们提出了 ASTERS，一种基于电阻式随机存取存储器 (ReRAM) 的神经拟态设计，用于进行首次尖峰时间 SNN 推理。除了基本的新颖轴突和神经元电路之外，我们还通过硬件-软件协同设计提出了两种技术：“多级触发阈值调整”以减轻ReRAM设备工艺变化的影响，以及“定时阈值调整”以进一步加快计算速度。实验结果表明，与现有的尖峰神经拟态设计相比，我们的跨层解决方案 ASTERS 实现了超过 34.7% 的节能，同时在标准偏差为 20% 的工艺变化下保持了 90.1% 的精度。

items.title: VStore: in-storage graph based vector search accelerator.
items.abstract: Graph-based vector search that finds best matches to user queries based on their semantic similarities using a graph data structure, becomes instrumental in data science and AI application. However, deploying graph-based vector search in production systems requires high accuracy and cost-efficiency with low latency and memory footprint, which existing work fails to offer. We present VStore, a graph-based vector search solution that collaboratively optimizes accuracy, latency, memory, and data movement on large-scale vector data based on in-storage computing. The evaluation shows that VStore exhibits significant search efficiency improvement and energy reduction while attaining accuracy over CPU, GPU, and ZipNN platforms.
items.abstract_zh: 基于图的矢量搜索可以使用图数据结构根据用户查询的语义相似性找到与用户查询的最佳匹配，这在数据科学和人工智能应用中发挥着重要作用。然而，在生产系统中部署基于图的矢量搜索需要高精度和成本效益以及低延迟和内存占用，而现有工作无法提供这些。我们推出了 VStore，这是一种基于图的矢量搜索解决方案，可基于存储内计算协同优化大规模矢量数据的准确性、延迟、内存和数据移动。评估表明，VStore 表现出显着的搜索效率提升和能耗降低，同时获得了超过 CPU、GPU 和 ZipNN 平台的准确性。

items.title: Hammer: a modular and reusable physical design flow tool: invited.
items.abstract: Process technology scaling and hardware architecture specialization have vastly increased the need for chip design space exploration, while optimizing for power, performance, and area. Hammer is an open-source, reusable physical design (PD) flow generator that reduces design effort and increases portability by enforcing a separation among design-, tool-, and process technology-specific concerns with a modular software architecture. In this work, we outline Hammer's structure and highlight recent extensions that support both physical chip designers and hardware architects evaluating the merit and feasibility of their proposed designs. This is accomplished through the integration of more tools and process technologies---some open-source---and the designer-driven development of flow step generators. An evaluation of chip designs in process technologies ranging from 130nm down to 12nm across a series of RISC-V-based chips shows how Hammer-generated flows are reusable and enable efficient optimization for diverse applications.
items.abstract_zh: 工艺技术的扩展和硬件架构的专业化极大地增加了对芯片设计空间探索的需求，同时优化了功耗、性能和面积。 Hammer 是一款开源、可重用的物理设计 (PD) 流程生成器，通过模块化软件架构强制分离设计、工具和流程技术特定问题，从而减少设计工作量并提高可移植性。在这项工作中，我们概述了 Hammer 的结构，并重点介绍了最近的扩展，这些扩展支持物理芯片设计人员和硬件架构师评估其拟议设计的优点和可行性。这是通过集成更多工具和工艺技术（其中一些是开源的）以及设计人员驱动的流程步骤生成器的开发来实现的。对一系列基于 RISC-V 芯片的从 130nm 到 12nm 工艺技术的芯片设计进行评估，展示了 Hammer 生成的流程如何可重复使用，并如何实现不同应用的高效优化。

items.title: NovelRewrite: node-level parallel AIG rewriting.
items.abstract: Logic rewriting is an important part in logic optimization. It rewrites a circuit by replacing local subgraphs with logically equivalent ones, so that the area and the delay of the circuit can be optimized. This paper introduces a parallel AIG rewriting algorithm with a new concept of logical cuts. Experiments show that this algorithm implemented with one GPU can be on average 32X faster than the logic rewriting in the logic synthesis tool ABC on large benchmarks. Compared with other logic rewriting acceleration works, ours has the best quality and the shortest running time.
