With the insights, we formulate a metric to determine the number of unchanged momentum values in a training iteration due to the FP encoding. Based on the metric, we develop an algorithm to find FP encodings that are more memory-efficient than the standard FP encodings. In our experiments, the memory usage in BNN training is decreased by factors 2.47x, 2.43x, 2.04x, depending on the BNN model, with minimal accuracy cost (smaller than 1%) compared to using 32-bit FP encoding.
items.abstract_zh:
一种富有远见的计算范式是使用专用的低功耗加速器而不是云基础设施在边缘训练资源高效的神经网络，从而消除通信开销和隐私问题。一种有前景的资源高效推理方法是二值化神经网络 (BNN)，它将参数和激活二值化。然而，训练 BNN 仍然需要大量资源。最先进的 BNN 训练方法，例如二进制优化器 (Bop)，需要以浮点 (FP) 格式存储和更新大量动量值。

在这项工作中，我们重点关注 Bop 中动量值的内存高效 FP 编码。为了实现这一目标，我们首先研究任意 FP 编码的影响。当 FP 格式选择不当时，我们证明动量值的更新可能会丢失，从而导致训练质量下降。根据这些见解，我们制定了一个指标来确定训练迭代中由于 FP 编码而保持不变的动量值的数量。基于该指标，我们开发了一种算法来查找比标准 FP 编码更节省内存的 FP 编码。在我们的实验中，与使用 32 位 FP 编码相比，BNN 训练中的内存使用量减少了 2.47 倍、2.43 倍、2.04 倍（具体取决于 BNN 模型），并且准确度成本最小（小于 1%）。

items.title: ScaleHLS: a scalable high-level synthesis framework with multi-level transformations and optimizations: invited.
items.abstract: This paper presents an enhanced version of a scalable HLS (High-Level Synthesis) framework named ScaleHLS, which can compile HLS C/C++ programs and PyTorch models to highly-efficient and synthesizable C++ designs. The original version of ScaleHLS achieved significant speedup on both C/C++ kernels and PyTorch models [14]. In this paper, we first highlight the key features of ScaleHLS on tackling the challenges present in the representation, optimization, and exploration of large-scale HLS designs. To further improve the scalability of ScaleHLS, we then propose an enhanced HLS transform and analysis library supported in both C++ and Python, and a new design space exploration algorithm to handle HLS designs with hierarchical structures more effectively. Comparing to the original ScaleHLS, our enhanced version improves the speedup by up to 60.9× on FPGAs. ScaleHLS is fully open-sourced at https://github.com/hanchenye/scalehls.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个名为 ScaleHLS 的可扩展 HLS（高级综合）框架的增强版本，它可以将 HLS C/C++ 程序和 PyTorch 模型编译为高效且可综合的 C++ 设计。 ScaleHLS 的原始版本在 C/C++ 内核和 PyTorch 模型上都实现了显着的加速 [14]。在本文中，我们首先强调 ScaleHLS 在解决大规模 HLS 设计的表示、优化和探索中存在的挑战方面的关键特性。为了进一步提高 ScaleHLS 的可扩展性，我们提出了一个支持 C++ 和 Python 的增强型 HLS 转换和分析库，以及一种新的设计空间探索算法，以更有效地处理具有分层结构的 HLS 设计。与原始 ScaleHLS 相比，我们的增强版本在 FPGA 上的加速比提高了 60.9 倍。 ScaleHLS 在 https://github.com/hanchenye/scalehls 上完全开源。

items.title: Efficient bayesian yield analysis and optimization with active learning.
items.abstract: Yield optimization for circuit design is computationally intensive due to the expensive yield estimation based on Monte Carlo methods and the difficult optimization process. In this work, a uniform framework to solve these problems simultaneously is proposed. Firstly, a novel efficient Bayesian yield analysis framework, BYA, is proposed by deriving a Bayesian estimation for the yield and introducing active learning based on reductions of integral entropy. A tractable convolutional entropy infill technique is then proposed to efficiently solve the entropy reduction problem. Lastly, we extend BYA for yield optimization by transforming knowledge across the design space and variational space. Experimental results based on SRAM and adder circuits show that BYA is 410x faster (in terms of the number of simulations) than standard MC and averagely 10x (up to 10000x) more accurate than the state-of-the-art method for yield estimation, and is about 5x faster than the SOTA yield optimization methods.
items.abstract_zh: 由于基于蒙特卡罗方法的良率估计成本高昂且优化过程困难，电路设计的良率优化需要大量计算。在这项工作中，提出了一个同时解决这些问题的统一框架。首先，通过推导产量的贝叶斯估计并引入基于积分熵减少的主动学习，提出了一种新颖的高效贝叶斯产量分析框架 BYA。然后提出了一种易于处理的卷积熵填充技术来有效解决熵减少问题。最后，我们通过跨设计空间和变分空间转换知识来扩展 BYA 以实现良率优化。基于 SRAM 和加法器电路的实验结果表明，BYA 比标准 MC 快 410 倍（就模拟数量而言），比最先进的良率估计方法平均准确 10 倍（高达 10000 倍），比 SOTA 良率优化方法快约 5 倍。

items.title: NN-LUT: neural approximation of non-linear operations for efficient transformer inference.
items.abstract: Non-linear operations such as GELU, Layer normalization, and Soft-max are essential yet costly building blocks of Transformer models. Several prior works simplified these operations with look-up tables or integer computations, but such approximations suffer inferior accuracy or considerable hardware cost with long latency. This paper proposes an accurate and hardware-friendly approximation framework for efficient Transformer inference. Our framework employs a simple neural network as a universal approximator with its structure equivalently transformed into a Look-up table(LUT). The proposed framework called Neural network generated LUT( NN-LUT ) can accurately replace all the non-linear operations in popular BERT models with significant reductions in area, power consumption, and latency.
items.abstract_zh: GELU、层归一化和 Soft-max 等非线性操作是 Transformer 模型必不可少但成本高昂的构建块。一些先前的工作通过查找表或整数计算简化了这些操作，但这种近似的准确性较低或相当大的硬件成本和较长的延迟。本文提出了一种准确且硬件友好的近似框架，用于高效的 Transformer 推理。我们的框架采用一个简单的神经网络作为通用逼近器，其结构等效地转换为查找表（LUT）。所提出的称为神经网络生成 LUT（NN-LUT）的框架可以准确地取代流行的 BERT 模型中的所有非线性操作，并显着减少面积、功耗和延迟。

items.title: Scaled-CBSC: scaled counting-based stochastic computing multiplication for improved accuracy.
items.abstract: Stochastic computing (SC) can lead area-efficient implementation of logic designs. Existing SC multiplication, however, suffers a long-standing problem: large multiplication error with small inputs due to its intrinsic nature of bit-stream based computing. In this article, we propose a new scaled counting-based SC multiplication approach, called Scaled-CBSC , to mitigate this issue by introducing scaling bits to ensure the bit '1' density of the stochastic number is sufficiently large. The idea is to convert the "small" inputs to "large" inputs, thus improve the accuracy of SC multiplication. But different from an existing stream-bit based approach, the new method uses the binary format and does not require stochastic addition as the SC multiplication always starts with binary numbers. Furthermore, Scaled-CBSC only requires all the numbers to be larger than 0.5 instead of arbitrary defined threshold, which leads to integer numbers only for the scaling term. The experimental results show that the 8-bit Scaled-CBSC multiplication with 3 scaling bits can achieve up to 46.6% and 30.4% improvements in mean error and standard deviation, respectively; reduce the peak relative error from 100% to 1.8%; and improve 12.6%, 51.5%, 57.6%, 58.4% in delay, area, area-delay product, energy consumption, respectively, over the state of art work. Furthermore, we evaluate the proposed multiplication approach in a discrete cosine transformation (DCT) application. The results show that with 3 scaling bits, 8-bit scaled counting-based SC multiplication can improve the image quality with 5.9dB upon the state of art work in average.
items.abstract_zh: 随机计算 (SC) 可以实现逻辑设计的面积高效实现。然而，现有的 SC 乘法存在一个长期存在的问题：由于其基于比特流的计算的本质，小输入时会出现较大的乘法误差。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的基于缩放计数的 SC 乘法方法，称为 Scaled-CBSC，通过引入缩放位以确保随机数的位“1”密度足够大来缓解此问题。这个想法是将“小”输入转换为“大”输入，从而提高 SC 乘法的精度。但与现有的基于流位的方法不同，新方法使用二进制格式，并且不需要随机加法，因为 SC 乘法始终以二进制数开始。此外，Scaled-CBSC仅要求所有数字大于0.5，而不是任意定义的阈值，这导致缩放项仅是整数。实验结果表明，具有3个缩放位的8位Scaled-CBSC乘法可以在平均误差和标准差方面分别实现高达46.6%和30.4%的改进；将峰值相对误差从 100% 降低至 1.8%；与现有技术相比，延迟、面积、面积延迟乘积、能耗分别提高了 12.6%、51.5%、57.6%、58.4%。此外，我们在离散余弦变换（DCT）应用中评估了所提出的乘法方法。结果表明，在 3 个缩放位的情况下，8 位缩放的基于计数的 SC 乘法可以将图像质量平均提高 5.9dB。

items.title: MC-CIM: a reconfigurable computation-in-memory for efficient stereo matching cost computation.
items.abstract: This paper proposes the design of a computation-in-memory for stereo matching cost computation. The matching cost computation incurs large energy and latency overhead because of frequent memory access. To overcome previous design limitations, this work, named MC-CIM, performs matching cost computation without incurring memory access and introduces several key features. (1) Lightweight balanced computing unit is integrated within cell array to reduce memory access and improve system throughput. (2) Self-optimized circuit design enables to alter arithmetic operation for matching algorithm in various scenario. (3) Flexible data mapping method and reconfigurable digital peripheral explore maximum parallelism on different algorithm and bit-precision. The proposed design is implemented in 28nm technology and achieves average performance of 277 TOPs/W.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于立体匹配成本计算的内存计算的设计。由于频繁的内存访问，匹配成本计算会产生大量的能量和延迟开销。为了克服以前的设计限制，这项名为 MC-CIM 的工作在不产生内存访问的情况下执行匹配成本计算，并引入了几个关键功能。 (1) 轻量级平衡计算单元集成在单元阵列内，减少内存访问，提高系统吞吐量。 (2)自我优化的电路设计可以改变算术运算以在各种场景下匹配算法。 (3)灵活的数据映射方法和可重构数字外设探索不同算法和位精度上的最大并行性。所提出的设计采用 28nm 技术实现，平均性能达到 277 TOPs/W。

items.title: Enabling efficient deep convolutional neural network-based sensor fusion for autonomous driving.
items.abstract: Autonomous driving demands accurate perception and safe decision-making. To achieve this, automated vehicles are typically equipped with multiple sensors (e.g., cameras, Lidar, etc.), enabling them to exploit complementary environmental contexts by fusing data from different sensing modalities. With the success of Deep Convolutional Neural Network (DCNN), the fusion between multiple DCNNs has been proved to be a promising strategy to achieve satisfactory perception accuracy. However, existing mainstream DCNN fusion strategies conduct fusion by simply element-wisely adding feature maps extracted from different modalities together at various stages, failing to consider whether the features being fused are matched or not. Therefore, we first propose a feature disparity metric to quantitatively measure the degree of feature disparity between the fusing feature maps. Then, we propose a Fusion-filter as the Feature-matching techniques to tackle the feature-mismatching issue. We also propose a Layer-sharing technique in the deep layer of the DCNN to achieve high accuracy. With the assistance of feature disparity working as an additional loss, our proposed technologies enable DCNN to learn corresponding feature maps with similar characteristics and complementary visual context from different modalities. Evaluations demonstrate that our proposed fusion techniques can achieve higher accuracy on KITTI dataset with less computation resources consumption.
items.abstract_zh: 自动驾驶需要准确的感知和安全的决策。为了实现这一目标，自动驾驶车辆通常配备多个传感器（例如摄像头、激光雷达等），使它们能够通过融合来自不同传感方式的数据来利用互补的环境背景。随着深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）的成功，多个DCNN之间的融合已被证明是一种有前景的策略，可以实现令人满意的感知精度。然而，现有的主流DCNN融合策略通过简单地将各个阶段从不同模态提取的特征图逐元素相加来进行融合，没有考虑融合的特征是否匹配。因此，我们首先提出一种特征视差度量来定量测量融合特征图之间的特征视差程度。然后，我们提出融合过滤器作为特征匹配技术来解决特征不匹配问题。我们还在 DCNN 的深层提出了层共享技术以实现高精度。在特征差异作为额外损失的帮助下，我们提出的技术使 DCNN 能够从不同模态学习具有相似特征和互补视觉上下文的相应特征图。评估表明，我们提出的融合技术可以在 KITTI 数据集上以更少的计算资源消耗实现更高的精度。

items.title: Scalable crash consistency for secure persistent memory.
items.abstract: Persistent memory (PM) suffers from data security and crash consistency issues due to non-volatility. Counter-mode encryption (CME) and bonsai merkle tree (BMT) have been adopted to ensure data security by using security metadata. The data and its security metadata need to be atomically persisted for correct recovery. To ensure crash consistency, durable transactions have been widely employed. However, the long-time BMT update increases the transaction latency, and the security metadata incur heavy write traffic. This paper presents Secon to ensure SEcurity and crash CONsistency for PM with high performance. Secon leverages a scalable write-through metadata cache to ensure the atomicity of data and its security metadata. To reduce the transaction latency, Secon proposes a transaction-specific epoch persistency model to minimize the ordering constraints. To reduce the amount of PM writes, Secon co-locates counters with log entries and coalesces BMT blocks. Experimental results demonstrate that Secon significantly improves the transaction performance and decreases the write traffic.
items.abstract_zh: 持久内存（PM）由于非易失性而面临数据安全和崩溃一致性问题。采用计数器模式加密（CME）和盆景默克尔树（BMT），利用安全元数据确保数据安全。数据及其安全元数据需要以原子方式持久保存才能正确恢复。为了保证崩溃一致性，持久事务被广泛采用。然而，长时间的BMT更新会增加事务延迟，并且安全元数据会产生大量写入流量。本文提出了 Secon，以确保高性能 PM 的安全性和崩溃一致性。 Secon 利用可扩展的直写元数据缓存来确保数据及其安全元数据的原子性。为了减少事务延迟，Secon 提出了一种特定于事务的纪元持久性模型，以最小化排序约束。为了减少 PM 写入量，Secon 将计数器与日志条目放在同一位置，并合并 BMT 块。实验结果表明Secon显着提高了事务性能并降低了写入流量。

items.title: Bringing source-level debugging frameworks to hardware generators.
items.abstract: High-level hardware generators have significantly increased the productivity of design engineers. They use software engineering constructs to reduce the repetition required to express complex designs and enable more composability. However, these benefits are undermined by a lack of debugging infrastructure, requiring hardware designers to debug generated, usually incomprehensible, RTL code. This paper describes a framework that connects modern software source-level debugging frameworks to RTL created from hardware generators. Our working prototype offers an Integrated Development Environment (IDE) experience for generators such as RocketChip (Chisel), allowing designers to set breakpoints in complex source code, relate RTL simulation state back to source-level variables, and do forward and backward debugging, with almost no simulation overhead (less than 5%).
items.abstract_zh: 高级硬件生成器显着提高了设计工程师的生产力。他们使用软件工程构造来减少表达复杂设计所需的重复并实现更多的可组合性。然而，这些好处因缺乏调试基础设施而受到损害，需要硬件设计人员调试生成的、通常难以理解的 RTL 代码。本文描述了一个将现代软件源代码级调试框架连接到从硬件生成器创建的 RTL 的框架。我们的工作原型为 RocketChip (Chisel) 等生成器提供了集成开发环境 (IDE) 体验，允许设计人员在复杂的源代码中设置断点，将 RTL 仿真状态与源代码级变量相关联，并进行前向和后向调试，几乎没有仿真开销（小于 5%）。

items.title: A fast parameter tuning framework via transfer learning and multi-objective bayesian optimization.
items.abstract: Design space exploration (DSE) can automatically and effectively determine design parameters to achieve the optimal performance, power and area (PPA) in very large-scale integration (VLSI) design. The lack of prior knowledge causes low efficient exploration. In this paper, a fast parameter tuning framework via transfer learning and multi-objective Bayesian optimization is proposed to quickly find the optimal design parameters. Gaussian Copula is utilized to establish the correlation of the implemented technology. The prior knowledge is integrated into multi-objective Bayesian optimization through transforming the PPA data to residual observation. The uncertainty-aware search acquisition function is employed to explore design space efficiently. Experiments on a CPU design show that this framework can achieve a higher quality of Pareto frontier with less design flow running than state-of-the-art methodologies.
items.abstract_zh: 设计空间探索（DSE）可以自动有效地确定设计参数，以在超大规模集成（VLSI）设计中实现最佳性能、功耗和面积（PPA）。先验知识的缺乏导致探索效率低下。本文提出了一种通过迁移学习和多目标贝叶斯优化的快速参数调整框架，以快速找到最佳设计参数。高斯 Copula 用于建立所实施技术的相关性。通过将PPA数据转换为残差观测，将先验知识集成到多目标贝叶斯优化中。采用不确定性感知搜索获取功能来有效地探索设计空间。 CPU 设计实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，该框架可以用更少的设计流程实现更高质量的 Pareto 前沿。

items.title: Statistical computing framework and demonstration for in-memory computing systems.
items.abstract: With the increasing importance of data-intensive workloads, such as AI, in-memory computing (IMC) has demonstrated substantial energy/throughput benefits by addressing both compute and data-movement/accessing costs, and holds significant further promise by its ability to leverage emerging forms of highly-scaled memory technologies. However, IMC fundamentally derives its advantages through parallelism, which poses a trade-off with SNR, whereby variations and noise in nanoscaled devices directly limit possible gains. In this work, we propose novel training approaches to improve model tolerance to noise via a contrastive loss function and a progressive training procedure. We further propose a methodology for modeling and calibrating hardware noise, efficiently at the level of a macro operation and through a limited number of hardware measurements. The approaches are demonstrated on a fabricated MRAM-based IMC prototype in 22nm FD-SOI, together with a neural network training framework implemented in PyTorch. For CIFAR-10/100 classifications, model performance is restored to the level of ideal noise-free execution, and generalized performance of the trained model deployed across different chips is demonstrated.
items.abstract_zh: 随着 AI 等数据密集型工作负载的重要性日益增加，内存计算 (IMC) 通过解决计算和数据移动/访问成本，展现了巨大的能源/吞吐量优势，并因其利用新兴形式的高度扩展内存技术的能力而前景广阔。然而，IMC 从根本上通过并行性获得其优势，这会与 SNR 进行权衡，纳米级器件中的变化和噪声直接限制了可能的增益。在这项工作中，我们提出了新颖的训练方法，通过对比损失函数和渐进式训练过程来提高模型对噪声的容忍度。我们进一步提出了一种在宏观操作层面上并通过有限数量的硬件测量有效地建模和校准硬件噪声的方法。这些方法在 22nm FD-SOI 中制造的基于 MRAM 的 IMC 原型上以及在 PyTorch 中实现的神经网络训练框架上进行了演示。对于 CIFAR-10/100 分类，模型性能恢复到理想的无噪声执行水平，并展示了跨不同芯片部署的训练模型的通用性能。

items.title: AVATAR: an aging- and variation-aware dynamic timing analyzer for application-based DVAFS.
items.abstract: As the timing guardband continues to increase with the continuous technology scaling, better-than-worst-case (BTWC) design has gained more and more attention. BTWC design can improve energy efficiency and/or performance by relaxing the conservative static timing constraints and exploiting the dynamic timing margin. However, to avoid potential reliability hazards, the existing dynamic timing analysis (DTA) tools have to add extra aging and variation guardbands, which are estimated under the worst-case corners of aging and variation. Such guardbanding method introduces unnecessary margin in timing analysis, thus reducing the performance and efficiency gains of BTWC designs. Therefore, in this paper, we propose AVATAR, an aging- and variation-aware dynamic timing analyzer that can perform DTA with the impact of transistor aging and random process variation. We also propose an application-based dynamic-voltage-accuracy-frequency-scaling (DVAFS) design flow based on AVATAR, which can improve energy efficiency by exploiting both dynamic timing slack (DTS) and the intrinsic error tolerance of the application. The results show that a 45.8% performance improvement and 68% power savings can be achieved by exploiting the intrinsic error tolerance. Compared with the conventional flow based on the corner-based DTA, the additional performance improvement of the proposed flow can be up to 14% or the additional power-saving can be up to 20%.
items.abstract_zh: 随着时序保护带随着技术的不断扩展而不断增加，优于最坏情况（BTWC）设计越来越受到关注。 BTWC 设计可以通过放宽保守的静态时序约束并利用动态时序裕度来提高能效和/或性能。然而，为了避免潜在的可靠性危害，现有的动态时序分析（DTA）工具必须添加额外的老化和变化保护带，这些保护带是在老化和变化的最坏情况下进行估计的。这种保护带方法在时序分析中引入了不必要的余量，从而降低了 BTWC 设计的性能和效率增益。因此，在本文中，我们提出了 AVATAR，一种老化和变化感知的动态时序分析仪，可以在晶体管老化和随机过程变化的影响下执行 DTA。我们还提出了一种基于 AVATAR 的基于应用的动态电压精度频率缩放 (DVAFS) 设计流程，该流程可以通过利用动态时序裕量 (DTS) 和应用的固有容错能力来提高能效。结果表明，通过利用内在容错能力，可以实现 45.8% 的性能提升和 68% 的功耗节省。与基于角点DTA的传统流程相比，所提出的流程的额外性能提升可达14%或额外节能可达20%。

items.title: H2H: heterogeneous model to heterogeneous system mapping with computation and communication awareness.
items.abstract: The complex nature of real-world problems calls for heterogeneity in both machine learning (ML) models and hardware systems. The heterogeneity in ML models comes from multi-sensor perceiving and multi-task learning, i.e., multi-modality multi-task (MMMT), resulting in diverse deep neural network (DNN) layers and computation patterns. The heterogeneity in systems comes from diverse processing components, as it becomes the prevailing method to integrate multiple dedicated accelerators into one system. Therefore, a new problem emerges: heterogeneous model to heterogeneous system mapping ( H2H ). While previous mapping algorithms mostly focus on efficient computations, in this work, we argue that it is indispensable to consider computation and communication simultaneously for better system efficiency. We propose a novel H2H mapping algorithm with both computation and communication awareness; by slightly trading computation for communication, the system overall latency and energy consumption can be largely reduced. The superior performance of our work is evaluated based on MAESTRO modeling, demonstrating 15%-74% latency reduction and 23%-64% energy reduction compared with existing computation-prioritized mapping algorithms. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/xyzxinyizhang/H2H.
items.abstract_zh: 现实世界问题的复杂性要求机器学习 (ML) 模型和硬件系统具有异构性。机器学习模型的异构性来自于多传感器感知和多任务学习，即多模态多任务（MMMT），导致不同的深度神经网络（DNN）层和计算模式。系统的异构性来自于不同的处理组件，因为将多个专用加速器集成到一个系统中已成为流行的方法。因此，一个新的问题出现了：异构模型到异构系统的映射（H2H）。虽然以前的映射算法主要关注高效计算，但在这项工作中，我们认为同时考虑计算和通信对于提高系统效率是必不可少的。我们提出了一种新颖的 H2H 映射算法，具有计算和通信意识；通过稍微牺牲计算量来换取通信，可以大大降低系统整体延迟和能耗。我们的工作的优越性能是基于 MAESTRO 建模进行评估的，与现有的计算优先的映射算法相比，延迟减少了 15%-74%，能耗减少了 23%-64%。代码可在 https://github.com/xyzxinyizhang/H2H 上公开获取。

items.title: CP-SRAM: charge-pulsation SRAM marco for ultra-high energy-efficiency computing-in-memory.
items.abstract: SRAM-based computing-in-memory (SRAM-CIM) provides fast speed and good scalability with advanced process technology. However, the energy efficiency of the state-of-the-art current-domain SRAM-CIM bit-cell structure is limited and the peripheral circuitry (e.g., DAC/ADC) for high-precision is expensive. This paper proposes a charge-pulsation SRAM (CP-SRAM) structure to achieve ultra-high energy-efficiency thanks to its charge-domain mechanism. Furthermore, our proposed CP-SRAM CIM supports configurable precision (2/4/6-bit). The CP-SRAM CIM macro was designed in 180nm (with silicon verification) and 40nm (simulation) nodes. The simulation results in 40nm show that our macro can achieve energy efficiency of ~2950Tops/W at 2-bit precision, ~576.4 Tops/W at 4-bit precision and ~111.7 Tops/W at 6-bit precision, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 基于 SRAM 的内存计算 (SRAM-CIM) 通过先进的处理技术提供快速的速度和良好的可扩展性。然而，最先进的电流域 SRAM-CIM 位单元结构的能效有限，且高精度外围电路（例如 DAC/ADC）价格昂贵。本文提出了一种电荷脉动SRAM（CP-SRAM）结构，凭借其电荷域机制实现超高能效。此外，我们提出的 CP-SRAM CIM 支持可配置精度（2/4/6 位）。 CP-SRAM CIM 宏在 180nm（带硅验证）和 40nm（模拟）节点中设计。 40nm 的仿真结果表明，我们的宏可以在 2 位精度下实现约 2950Tops/W 的能效，在 4 位精度下实现约 576.4 Tops/W 的能效，在 6 位精度下实现约 111.7 Tops/W 的能效。

items.title: Precise and scalable shared cache contention analysis for WCET estimation.
items.abstract: Worst-Case Execution Time (WCET) analysis for real-time tasks must precisely predict cache hit/miss of memory accesses. While bringing great performance benefits, multi-core processors significantly complicate the cache analysis problem due to the shared cache contentions among different cores. Existing methods pessimistically consider that memory references of parallel executing tasks will contend with each other as long as they are mapped to the same cache line. However, in reality, numerous shared cache contentions are mutually exclusive, due to the partial orders among the programs executed in parallel. The presence of shared cache contentions greatly exacerbates the computational complexity of the WCET computation, as finding the longest path needs exploring an exponentially large partial ordering space. In this paper, we propose a quantitative method with O( n 2 ) time complexity to precisely estimate the worst-case extra execution time (WCEET) caused by shared cache contentions. The proposed method can be easily integrated into the abstract-interpretation based WCET estimation framework. Experiments with MRTC benchmarks show that our method can averagely tighten the WCET estimation by 13% without sacrificing the analysis efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 实时任务的最坏情况执行时间 (WCET) 分析必须精确预测内存访问的缓存命中/未命中。在带来巨大性能优势的同时，多核处理器由于不同内核之间的共享缓存争用而使缓存分析问题变得非常复杂。现有的方法悲观地认为，并行执行任务的内存引用只要映射到同一缓存线就会相互竞争。然而，实际上，由于并行执行的程序之间存在偏序，因此许多共享缓存争用是互斥的。共享缓存争用的存在极大地加剧了 WCET 计算的计算复杂性，因为找到最长路径需要探索指数级大的部分排序空间。在本文中，我们提出了一种时间复杂度为 O( n 2 ) 的定量方法来精确估计由共享缓存争用引起的最坏情况额外执行时间（WCEET）。所提出的方法可以很容易地集成到基于抽象解释的 WCET 估计框架中。 MRTC 基准​​测试表明，我们的方法可以在不牺牲分析效率的情况下将 WCET 估计平均收紧 13%。

items.title: L-QoCo: learning to optimize cache capacity overloading in storage systems.
items.abstract:
Cache plays an important role to maintain high and stable performance (i.e. high throughput, low tail latency and throughput jitter) in storage systems. Existing rule-based cache management methods, coupled with engineers' manual configurations, cannot meet ever-growing requirements of both time-varying workloads and complex storage systems, leading to frequent cache overloading.

In this paper, we propose the first light-weight learning-based cache bandwidth control technique, called L-QoCo which can adaptively control the cache bandwidth so as to effectively prevent cache overloading in storage systems. Extensive experiments with various workloads on real systems show that L-QoCo, with its strong adaptability and fast learning ability, can adapt to various workloads to effectively control cache bandwidth, thereby significantly improving the storage performance (e.g. increasing the throughput by 10%-20% and reducing the throughput jitter and tail latency by 2X-6X and 1.5X-4X, respectively, compared with two representative rule-based methods).
items.abstract_zh:
缓存对于维持存储系统的高性能和稳定的性能（即高吞吐量、低尾延迟和吞吐量抖动）起着重要作用。现有的基于规则的缓存管理方法，加上工程师的手动配置，无法满足时变工作负载和复杂存储系统不断增长的需求，导致缓存频繁过载。

在本文中，我们提出了第一个基于学习的轻量级缓存带宽控制技术，称为L-QoCo，它可以自适应地控制缓存带宽，从而有效防止存储系统中的缓存过载。在真实系统上对各种工作负载进行的大量实验表明，L-QoCo具有很强的适应性和快速学习能力，可以适应各种工作负载，有效控制缓存带宽，从而显着提高存储性能（例如，与两种代表性的基于规则的方法相比，吞吐量提高10%-20%，吞吐量抖动和尾部延迟分别降低2X-6X和1.5X-4X）。

items.title: GATSPI: GPU accelerated gate-level simulation for power improvement.
items.abstract: In this paper, we present GATSPI, a novel GPU accelerated logic gate simulator that enables ultra-fast power estimation for industry-sized ASIC designs with millions of gates. GATSPI is written in PyTorch with custom CUDA kernels for ease of coding and maintainability. It achieves simulation kernel speedup of up to 1668X on a single-GPU system and up to 7412X on a multiple-GPU system when compared to a commercial gate-level simulator running on a single CPU core. GATSPI supports a range of simple to complex cell types from an industry standard cell library and SDF conditional delay statements without requiring prior calibration runs and produces industry-standard SAIF files from delay-aware gate-level simulation. Finally, we deploy GATSPI in a glitch-optimization flow, achieving a 1.4% power saving with a 449X speedup in turnaround time compared to a similar flow using a commercial simulator.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 GATSPI，这是一种新型 GPU 加速逻辑门模拟器，能够对具有数百万个门的工业规模 ASIC 设计进行超快速功耗估计。 GATSPI 是用 PyTorch 编写的，带有自定义 CUDA 内核，以便于编码和维护。与在单 CPU 内核上运行的商业门级模拟器相比，它在单 GPU 系统上实现了高达 1668 倍的模拟内核加速，在多 GPU 系统上实现了高达 7412 倍的模拟内核加速。 GATSPI 支持来自行业标准单元库和 SDF 条件延迟语句的一系列简单到复杂的单元类型，无需事先进行校准运行，并通过延迟感知门级仿真生成行业标准 SAIF 文件。最后，我们在故障优化流程中部署 GATSPI，与使用商业模拟器的类似流程相比，实现了 1.4% 的节能，周转时间加快了 449 倍。

items.title: A cost-efficient fully synthesizable stochastic time-to-digital converter design based on integral nonlinearity scrambling.
items.abstract: Stochastic time-to-digital converters (STDCs) are gaining increasing interest in submicron CMOS analog/mixed-signal design for their superior tolerance to nonlinear quantization levels. However, the large number of required delay units and time comparators for conventional STDC operation incurs excessive implementation costs. This paper presents a fully synthesizable STDC architecture based on an integral non-linearity (INL) scrambling technique, allowing order-of-magnitude cost reduction. The proposed technique randomizes and averages the STDC INL using a digital-to-time converter. Moreover, we propose an associated design automation flow and demonstrate an STDC design in 12nm FinFET process. Post-layout simulations show significant linearity and area/power efficiency improvements compared to prior arts.
items.abstract_zh: 随机时间数字转换器 (STDC) 因其对非线性量化水平的卓越耐受性而在亚微米 CMOS 模拟/混合信号设计中越来越受到关注。然而，传统 STDC 操作所需的大量延迟单元和时间比较器会导致过高的实施成本。本文提出了一种基于积分非线性 (INL) 加扰技术的完全可综合 STDC 架构，可实现数量级的成本降低。所提出的技术使用数字时间转换器对 STDC INL 进行随机化和平均化。此外，我们提出了相关的设计自动化流程，并演示了 12nm FinFET 工艺中的 STDC 设计。与现有技术相比，布局后仿真显示出显着的线性度和面积/功率效率改进。

items.title: CamSkyGate: camouflaged skyrmion gates for protecting ICs.
items.abstract: Magnetic skyrmion has the potential to become one of the candidates for emerging technologies due to its ultra-high integration density and ultra-low energy. Skyrmion is a magnetic pattern created by transverse current injection in the ferromagnetic (FM) layer. A skyrmion can be generated by localized spin-polarized current and behaves like a stable pseudoparticle. Different logic gates have been proposed, where the presence or absence of a single skyrmion is represented as binary logic 1 or logic 0, respectively. In this paper, we propose novel camouflaged logic gate designs to prevent an adversary from extracting the original netlist. The proposal uses differential doping to block the propagation of the skyrmions to realize the camouflaged gates. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to propose camouflaged skyrmion gates to prevent an adversary from performing reverse engineering. We demonstrate the functionality of different camouflaged gates using the mumax 3 micromagnetic simulator. We have also evaluated the security of the proposed camouflaged designs using SAT attacks. We show that the same security from the traditional CMOS-based camouflaged circuits can be retained.
items.abstract_zh: 磁性斯格明子由于其超高的集成密度和超低的能量，有潜力成为新兴技术的候选者之一。斯格明子是通过铁磁 (FM) 层中的横向电流注入产生的磁性图案。斯格明子可以通过局域自旋极化电流产生，并且表现得像稳定的赝粒子。已经提出了不同的逻辑门，其中单个斯格明子的存在或不存在分别表示为二进制逻辑1或逻辑0。在本文中，我们提出了新颖的伪装逻辑门设计，以防止对手提取原始网表。该提案使用不同的掺杂来阻止斯格明子的传播，以实现伪装栅极。据我们所知，我们是第一个提出伪装斯格明子门以防止对手进行逆向工程的人。我们使用 mumax 3 微磁模拟器演示了不同伪装门的功能。我们还评估了使用 SAT 攻击的伪装设计的安全性。我们证明，可以保留与传统基于 CMOS 的伪装电路相同的安全性。

items.title: Adaptive window-based sensor attack detection for cyber-physical systems.
items.abstract: Sensor attacks alter sensor readings and spoof Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) to perform dangerous actions. Existing detection works tend to minimize the detection delay and false alarms at the same time, while there is a clear trade-off between the two metrics. Instead, we argue that attack detection should dynamically balance the two metrics when a physical system is at different states. Along with this argument, we propose an adaptive sensor attack detection system that consists of three components - an adaptive detector, detection deadline estimator, and data logger. It can adapt the detection delay and thus false alarms at run time to meet a varying detection deadline and improve usability (or false alarms). Finally, we implement our detection system and validate it using multiple CPS simulators and a reduced-scale autonomous vehicle testbed.
items.abstract_zh: 传感器攻击会改变传感器读数并欺骗网络物理系统 (CPS) 以执行危险操作。现有的检测工作倾向于同时最小化检测延迟和误报，而这两个指标之间存在明显的权衡。相反，我们认为当物理系统处于不同状态时，攻击检测应该动态平衡这两个指标。除了这个论点之外，我们还提出了一种自适应传感器攻击检测系统，该系统由三个组件组成：自适应检测器、检测期限估计器和数据记录器。它可以调整检测延迟，从而调整运行时的误报，以满足不同的检测期限并提高可用性（或误报）。最后，我们实施我们的检测系统，并使用多个 CPS 模拟器和缩小规模的自动驾驶车辆测试台对其进行验证。

items.title: XMA: a crossbar-aware multi-task adaption framework via shift-based mask learning method.
items.abstract: ReRAM crossbar array as a high-parallel fast and energy-efficient structure attracts much attention, especially on the acceleration of Deep Neural Network (DNN) inference on one specific task. However, due to the high energy consumption of weight re-programming and the ReRAM cells' low endurance problem, adapting the crossbar array for multiple tasks has not been well explored. In this paper, we propose XMA , a novel crossbar-aware shift-based mask learning method for multiple task adaption in the ReRAM crossbar DNN accelerator for the first time. XMA leverages the popular mask-based learning algorithm's benefit to mitigate catastrophic forgetting and learn a task-specific, crossbar column-wise, and shift-based multi-level mask, rather than the most commonly used element-wise binary mask, for each new task based on a frozen backbone model. With our crossbar-aware design innovation, the required masking operation to adapt for a new task could be implemented in an existing crossbar-based convolution engine with minimal hardware/memory overhead and, more importantly, no need for power-hungry cell re-programming, unlike prior works. The extensive experimental results show that, compared with state-of-the-art multiple task adaption Piggyback method [1], XMA achieves 3.19% higher accuracy on average, while saving 96.6% memory overhead. Moreover, by eliminating cell re-programming, XMA achieves ~4.3x higher energy efficiency than Piggyback.
items.abstract_zh: ReRAM Crossbar 阵列作为一种高并行、快速、节能的结构备受关注，特别是在加速某一特定任务的深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理方面。然而，由于权重重新编程的高能耗和ReRAM单元的低耐用性问题，使交叉阵列适应多种任务尚未得到很好的探索。在本文中，我们提出了 XMA，这是一种新颖的基于交叉开关的基于移位的掩模学习方法，首次用于 ReRAM 交叉开关 DNN 加速器中的多任务自适应。 XMA 利用流行的基于掩码的学习算法的优势来减轻灾难性遗忘，并为每个基于冻结骨干模型的新任务学习特定于任务的、交叉列式和基于移位的多级掩码，而不是最常用的元素式二进制掩码。通过我们的交叉感知设计创新，适应新任务所需的掩码操作可以在现有的基于交叉的卷积引擎中实现，并且硬件/内存开销最小，更重要的是，与之前的工作不同，不需要耗电的单元重新编程。大量的实验结果表明，与最先进的多任务自适应 Piggyback 方法[1]相比，XMA 的准确率平均提高了 3.19%，同时节省了 96.6% 的内存开销。此外，通过消除单元重新编程，XMA 的能源效率比 Piggyback 高约 4.3 倍。

items.title: SRA: a secure ReRAM-based DNN accelerator.
items.abstract:
Deep Neural Network (DNN) accelerators are increasingly developed to pursue high efficiency in DNN computing. However, the IP protection of the DNNs deployed on such accelerators is an important topic that has been less addressed. Although there are previous works that targeted this problem for CMOS-based designs, there is still no solution for ReRAM-based accelerators which pose new security challenges due to their crossbar structure and non-volatility. ReRAM's non-volatility retains data even after the system is powered off, making the stored DNN model vulnerable to attacks by simply reading out the ReRAM content. Because the crossbar structure can only compute on plaintext data, encrypting the ReRAM content is no longer a feasible solution in this scenario.

In this paper, we propose SRA - a secure ReRAM-based DNN accelerator that stores DNN weights on crossbars in an encrypted format while still maintaining ReRAM's in-memory computing capability. The proposed encryption scheme also supports sharing bits among multiple weights, significantly reducing the storage overhead. In addition, SRA uses a novel high-bandwidth SC conversion scheme to protect each layer's intermediate results, which also contain sensitive information of the model. Our experimental results show that SRA can effectively prevent pirating the deployed DNN weights as well as the intermediate results with negligible accuracy loss, and achieves 1.14X performance speedup and 9% energy reduction compared to ISAAC - a non-secure ReRAM-based baseline.
items.abstract_zh:
深度神经网络（DNN）加速器的不断发展是为了追求 DNN 计算的高效率。然而，部署在此类加速器上的 DNN 的 IP 保护是一个重要的话题，但却很少被提及。尽管之前有针对基于 CMOS 设计的这一问题的研究，但基于 ReRAM 的加速器仍然没有解决方案，因为其交叉结构和非易失性带来了新的安全挑战。 ReRAM 的非易失性即使在系统断电后也能保留数据，使得存储的 DNN 模型很容易通过读取 ReRAM 内容而受到攻击。由于 crossbar 结构只能对明文数据进行计算，因此在这种情况下加密 ReRAM 内容不再是可行的解决方案。

在本文中，我们提出了 SRA——一种基于 ReRAM 的安全 DNN 加速器，它以加密格式将 DNN 权重存储在交叉开关上，同时仍然保持 ReRAM 的内存计算能力。所提出的加密方案还支持在多个权重之间共享比特，从而显着减少存储开销。此外，SRA采用新颖的高带宽SC转换方案来保护每一层的中间结果，其中也包含模型的敏感信息。我们的实验结果表明，SRA 可以有效防止盗用已部署的 DNN 权重以及中间结果，且精度损失可以忽略不计，与基于非安全 ReRAM 的基线 ISAAC 相比，实现了 1.14 倍的性能加速和 9% 的能耗降低。

items.title: High-performance placement for large-scale heterogeneous FPGAs with clock constraints.
items.abstract: With the increasing complexity of the field-programmable gate array (FPGA) architecture, heterogeneity and clock constraints have greatly challenged FPGA placement. In this paper, we present a high-performance placement algorithm for large-scale heterogeneous FPGAs with clock constraints. We first propose a connectivity-aware and type-balanced clustering method to construct the hierarchy and improve the scalability. In each hierarchy level, we develop a novel hybrid penalty and augmented Lagrangian method to formulate the heterogeneous and clock-aware placement as a sequence of unconstrained optimization subproblems and adopt the Adam method to solve each unconstrained optimization subproblem. Then, we present a matching-based IP blocks legalization to legalize the RAMs and DSPs, and a multi-stage packing technique is proposed to cluster FFs and LUTs into HCLBs. Finally, history-based legalization is developed to legalize CLBs in an FPGA. Based on the ISPD 2017 clock-aware FPGA placement contest benchmarks, experimental results show that our algorithm achieves the smallest routed wirelength for all the benchmarks among all published works in a reasonable runtime.
items.abstract_zh: 随着现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 架构的复杂性不断增加，异构性和时钟限制对 FPGA 布局提出了巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对具有时钟约束的大规模异构 FPGA 的高性能布局算法。我们首先提出了一种连接感知和类型平衡的聚类方法来构建层次结构并提高可扩展性。在每个层级中，我们开发了一种新颖的混合惩罚和增强拉格朗日方法，将异构和时钟感知的布局表示为一系列无约束优化子问题，并采用 Adam 方法来解决每个无约束优化子问题。然后，我们提出了一种基于匹配的 IP 块合法化来合法化 RAM 和 DSP，并提出了一种多级打包技术将 FF 和 LUT 聚类到 HCLB 中。最后，开发了基于历史的合法化来使 FPGA 中的 CLB 合法化。基于ISPD 2017时钟感知FPGA布局竞赛基准，实验结果表明，我们的算法在合理的运行时间内实现了所有已发布作品中所有基准的最小布线长度。

items.title: DAC '22: 59th ACM/IEEE Design Automation Conference, San Francisco, California, USA, July 10 - 14, 2022
